college_info.college_name: MITS Colleges: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for MITS Colleges admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Which companies generally recruit from Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science?
faqs.answer: Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science offers placement support to its students. Notable organizations that visit the institute for recruitment include Citrus Hotel, Linpack Technologies Pvt Ltd, Pinnacle Academy Of Aviation And Management Studies, Terminal Contacts, Nivika Enterprisese, Vilas Rajapkar Consultancy ( Opc ) Pvtltd, Topline Computers, Eprofess, Astamed Healthcare, Clixlogix Technologies Pvt Ltd, Linuxbean Pvt Solution, Healthsignz Pvt Limited, Globetele Services, Edvizo, Genaaue Engineering, Zone By The Park, K Nagaprathyusha, Grayquest Education Finance Private Limited, Deloitte And Touche Assurancr Enterprise Risk And Services India Pvt Ltd.

faqs.question: Which courses does Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science offer?
faqs.answer: Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science provides programmes including Ph.D, MBA/PGDM, B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, MCA in streams such as Business & Management Studies, Engineering, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Structural Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.

faqs.question: Is Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science is a well-known institution for Ph.D, MBA/PGDM, B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science has a rating of 4.31 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.39 on Campus Life, 4.32 on Placements, 4.37 on Faculty and 4.24 on Infrastructure.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 1131 students were admitted at Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science and 1151 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 1151 students 1012 were placed with median salary of INR 460000 and 85 students opted for higher studies. A total of 1086 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Scienceand 1145 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 1145 students 1016 were placed with median salary of INR 510000 and 101 students opted for higher studies.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science has an impressive review rating of 4.32 by 533 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. MITS Colleges fee structure ranges between INR 46,500 to 4,65,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence ) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Strong academics with supportive faculty, good infrastructure, and improving placement opportunities

review_content.Placements: In my college, 80 percentage of students are placed and I think the highest package is 24 LPA and the lowest is based on the course and branch last year (3 LPA) and average is about 6-8 LPA. For our campus, the top recruiting companies are Infosys, Accenture, L&T, Mindtree, Cognizant, IBM, and our college has high quality faculty. The internships are doing by everyone; most students did internship in Accenture and Infosys from 2nd year onwards. The top roles offered are SDE roles. Most students placed from the branch of CSE-AI, CSE-AIML.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the MITS College there is facility of hostel. We want to take separate hostel outside of college. The college infrastructure is good, having good equipment's in labs and Wi-Fi facility, and having central library and big block for the Computer Science lab. The classrooms are also very neat and having projector in each class with good infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good teaching and good facilities.

review_content.Placements: 53 percent of students get placed. The lowest package offered is 2.5 LPA, and the highest package offered is 12 LPA. Accenture is the top recruiting company for our course. Company-specific training is also given. The placement and training cell is also present, which is very useful to train students for interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are available. All facilities are good. Food is also good in the canteen. Sports and games opportunities are also given to interested students. The college is also very big. Wi-Fi is available anytime and anywhere in the college. Systems in the labs are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The campus is good with good placements.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course is about 80%. The highest package offered by the college is 12 LPA, the average package offered is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Mahindra, Accenture, TCS, and Cognizant. 80% of students get internships at the above companies. The top role offered is web developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. Wi-Fi is available in labs, classrooms, and the library. The quality of food in the hostels is good. Facilities like reading rooms and sports rooms are available near the canteen. A big ground and a small clinic are available on the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good for placement cracking.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students are getting placed in our college, and many companies like giving high packages will come to our college. Most of the students get internship, and every student focuses on skills and problem solving. The highest package in the previous year is 23.5LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Madanapalle Institute of Technology and Science is providing very good and excellent facilities of labs, classrooms, gym, sports, and have seperate sports club in my college. Our college supports students who are interested in sports and I do not belong to the college hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good campus life with decent placements and supportive faculty.

review_content.Placements: I am from B. Tech batch of Madanapalle Institute of Technology & Science, Madanapalle. Around 70–75 percent students got placed. The highest package was about 12 LPA, the lowest around 3 LPA, average nearly 4–4.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro came. Nearly 60 percent students got internships as software roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our course department has good classrooms, Wi-Fi, computer labs with needed software, and a big library with books and digital access. Hostels are clean, food is average but okay. Canteen is decent. Medical help is available. Sports grounds and indoor games are also there.

admission_overview.college_name: MITS Colleges Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: MITS Colleges Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MITS Colleges admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and Doctorate levels in several specialisations.MITS Collegesoffers After 10th Diploma and B.E. / B.Tech at UG level and MBA/PGDM and MCA at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 46,500 - 4,65,000. Aspirants have to payINR 86,000 - 1,61,800for PG courses.

description: MITS Colleges cutoff 2025 has been released based on AP ICET entrance scores. The cutoff varied based on categories, quotas and gender. Candidates can check out the sections below to know about the MITS Colleges 2025 cutoff across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. More updates are provided below:

With the release of the final round cutoff list, the MITS Colleges AP EAMCET cutoff 2024 came to an end. The cutoff was concluded in a few rounds for different categories of students belonging to the Home State quota. The AP EAMCET cutoff was released for admission to B.E. / B.Tech course. Considering the last round of MITS Colleges B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2024, the most challenging specialisations were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in CSE(Artificial Intelligence and Machine

In the table given below, students can find out the AP EAMCET category-wise, round-wise and branch-wise cutoff data for the past three years. As per the 2024 cutoff list, the last round closing ranks for B.E. / B.Tech admission was between 18877 and 88517. The most in-demand B.E. / B.Tech specialisation among the General HS category was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, for which the cutoff rank in 2024, 2023 and 2022 stood at 18877, 14204 and 14910, respectively. From the cutoff data
MITS Colleges accepts AP EAMCET ranks for admission to the BTech course. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out some of the important dates related to the AP EAMCET.

MITS Colleges Seat Allotment for AP EAPCET has been concluded. Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) holds AP EAMCET exam counselling to fill open seats in BTech, BPharm, and BSc agriculture, Bachelor in Fisheries, and Bachelor in Horticulture programmes. Candidates who participated in the AP EAMCET counselling 2024 can refer to the table below to download the year-wise counselling rounds.

Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table below to do the college comparison based on the AP EAMCET last round cutoff 2024. The cutoff data is available for different colleges, courses, and specialsiations available within the similar cutoff range of MITS Colleges most competitive course for the General HS quota. To enhance the searches, students can use the filters provided below to select different parameters such as location, categories, gender, etc.

The last round closing rank as per the MITS Colleges AP ICET cutoff 2024 was 38499 for MBA admission among the students belonging to the General HS quota.

faqs.question: How to apply for admission to College of Engineering Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer:
The candidates can apply online through the College of Engineering Bhubaneswar website. The final selection of the candidates will be based on their academic performance and entrance exam score. Given below are the steps on how to apply to College of Engineering Bhubaneswar:
Step 1: Go to the College of Engineering Bhubaneswar website and click on the "Admissions" tab.
Step 2: Click on the "Apply Online" button.
Step 3: Fill out the application form and submit it along with the required documents.
Step 4: Pay the application fee and submit the form.

The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. College of Engineering Bhubaneswar courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for College of Engineering Bhubaneswar courses stands around INR 1,37,000 to 3,58,800.

faqs.answer: A:    College of Engineering Bhubaneswar BTech admissions are entirely entrance-based. In order to apply for BTech at COEB, the basic eligibility criteria is to pass Class 12 with minimum 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) in Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the following subjects Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Computer Science/ Biology. Next, aspirants must qualify for JEE Main/ OJEE with a valid score. The final selection is done based on the past academic performance and entrance exam scores.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Before 2018-2019, our college was like an Autonomous College.

review_content.Placements: Only 10% of students are placed in our course. The lowest is 1.2 Lacs per annum, and the maximum is 1.7 Lacs per annum. Shree Cement & SPD Construction are the companies. No student got an internship. Junior Engineer & Site Engineer are the most preferred jobs available. This is the problem for everyone who is from a Tier 3 college. I am facing the same issue. The campus package is not more than 3 Lacs per annum. I was feeling very bad asking pass-out seniors about jobs. Then someone gave me a wise suggestion: He told me to find a good company, not a big company. Let me explain, I am a machine learning enthusiast, and he told me to find a startup that is working on data science and machine learning. Don’t worry about salary. It may be very less, but in that organization, you will get the best work experience. Your learning curve will be vertical. Believe me, you will see a wide difference in yourself after 1 year because in a startup, you have to work professionally on your own for a long time (1-1.5 years). After that, you can start applying for big corporates. Now your confidence and professional skills will help you to crack any interview. Don’t waste time or spend a year to find a high-paying job. Or else, if you have good enough skills that fulfill the requirements of big corporates, then definitely you can apply now.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Disappointed with finance

review_content.Placements: The placement rate is very low in our course and specially in our whole college, only 30-50%. Highest package was 4 LPA and lowest was 1.5 LPA. TCS, Wipro, HCL, Royal Enfield, OD Tech were the top recruiting companies. No one got internship from college. Mostly sales and few IT roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have got simple classroom with no projectors whereas there are projectors for MCA and b-tech. We have got access to library, computer labs and access to various clubs in our college. Food is average, no medical facility in college, multiple clubs are there.

review_summary.college_name: College of Engineering Bhubaneswar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Work hard to achieve success.

content.Placements: 85% percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 100000, the lowest package is 50000, and the average package is 75000. Our course offers various placement packages, including companies like TCS. Additionally, 45 percent of students received internships. The top role available in our course is Manager.
content.Infrastructure: We have various facilities provided like Wi-Fi, labs, cinema halls, auditorium hall, swimming pool, park, garden, etc. Infrastructure like smart classrooms, AC, LEDs, smart libraries, lifts, and many more things are available in our college. All qualities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Student review of College of Engineering, Bhubaneswar.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is above 70% in PCM. The highest package is of 20 Lacs per annum and the lowest is of 5 Lacs per annum. Top recruiters include Google, Amazon, etc. On campus placements are a bit hard to get due to huge number of students, so you can also try off campus just to be safe.
content.Infrastructure: There are many lab like Electronic, Electrical, Mechanical, Physics and Chemistry etc. Food quality of the hostel is not good. I did not like the food in hostels, but the rooms are great. Cleaning facilities are very good but time limit for outing is very less.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Before 2018-2019, our college was like an Autonomous College.

content.Placements: Only 10% of students are placed in our course. The lowest is 1.2 Lacs per annum, and the maximum is 1.7 Lacs per annum. Shree Cement & SPD Construction are the companies. No student got an internship. Junior Engineer & Site Engineer are the most preferred jobs available. This is the problem for everyone who is from a Tier 3 college. I am facing the same issue. The campus package is not more than 3 Lacs per annum. I was feeling very bad asking pass-out seniors about jobs. Then someone gave me a wise suggestion: He told me to find a good company, not a big company. Let me explain, I am a machine learning enthusiast, and he told me to find a startup that is working on data science and machine learning. Don’t worry about salary. It may be very less, but in that organization, you will get the best work experience. Your learning curve will be vertical. Believe me, you will see a wide difference in yourself after 1 year because in a startup, you have to work professionally on your own for a long time (1-1.5 years). After that, you can start applying for big corporates. Now your confidence and professional skills will help you to crack any interview. Don’t waste time or spend a year to find a high-paying job. Or else, if you have good enough skills that fulfill the requirements of big corporates, then definitely you can apply now.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Disappointed with finance

content.Placements: The placement rate is very low in our course and specially in our whole college, only 30-50%. Highest package was 4 LPA and lowest was 1.5 LPA. TCS, Wipro, HCL, Royal Enfield, OD Tech were the top recruiting companies. No one got internship from college. Mostly sales and few IT roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: We have got simple classroom with no projectors whereas there are projectors for MCA and b-tech. We have got access to library, computer labs and access to various clubs in our college. Food is average, no medical facility in college, multiple clubs are there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of College of Engineering Bhubaneswar.

content.Placements: Students got placed in our college with the highest and average salary packages. The highest salary package offered for a software developer in 2022 was 12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities like Wi-Fi, a chemical lab, a physics lab, a programming lab, an electrical lab, etc. Labs are available for respective branch students. The hostel has a huge playground for cricket and football. The hostel faculty members arrange activities to showcase our talents.
content.Faculty: All teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. They teach us fluently, so we can understand easily. This course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are not much difficult in our college.

hostel_campus.college_name: College of Engineering Bhubaneswar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Work hard to achieve success.
reviews.review_text: We have various facilities provided like Wi-Fi, labs, cinema halls, auditorium hall, swimming pool, park, garden, etc. Infrastructure like smart classrooms, AC, LEDs, smart libraries, lifts, and many more things are available in our college. All qualities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Student review of College of Engineering, Bhubaneswar.
reviews.review_text: There are many lab like Electronic, Electrical, Mechanical, Physics and Chemistry etc. Food quality of the hostel is not good. I did not like the food in hostels, but the rooms are great. Cleaning facilities are very good but time limit for outing is very less.

reviews.review_heading: Before 2018-2019, our college was like an Autonomous College.
reviews.review_text: Average facilities and infrastructure are available for our course. Classrooms are good, but labs are not good enough, and machines are very old, with some also not working. The hostel is below average. They take 72,000 per year but provide average quality food, and the rooms are also below average. The canteen is also average and not preferable for all.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed with finance
reviews.review_text: We have got simple classroom with no projectors whereas there are projectors for MCA and b-tech. We have got access to library, computer labs and access to various clubs in our college. Food is average, no medical facility in college, multiple clubs are there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering Bhubaneswar.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities like Wi-Fi, a chemical lab, a physics lab, a programming lab, an electrical lab, etc. Labs are available for respective branch students. The hostel has a huge playground for cricket and football. The hostel faculty members arrange activities to showcase our talents.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in our college. Free Wi-Fi is available in our college and hostel. Labs are available for all subjects to provide practical knowledge for students. The quality of food served in the hostel is good. Medical facilities and sports are not available. Hostel rooms are clean.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure without maintenance.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is neither good nor bad. Wi-fi facility is good. Classrooms and labs are student friendly. The canteen food is average.
Hostel is very good. Every floor has a separate wi-fi connections. Which is very good for us and good for our study we can access with Internet without any problem. Food is also good and hygienic for us. We play cricket in evening time so we can refresh our minds. Also play badminton in night hostel have these equipment's for sport purpose.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available on campus with a data limit of 1 GB. Labs did not fulfill the requirements. Library did not contain the latest books and limited books have to be taken to study. The canteen was not good. Sports were not played because there was no playground on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: The college provides 24*7 Wi-Fi. Labs are always clean and clear. Classrooms are better for studying. The library has a study environment. The quality of facilities in our hostel is very good. The quality of food is great. Food is available in the canteen. Medical facilities are always available. In front of our hostel, fields are available for playing cricket, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its teachers, infrastructure, and good placements are there for 2021 and 2022.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the course infrastructure is very good but the hostel facility is not good. Our college gives students practical knowledge. The classrooms are clean. But in the hostel, the management is not good. In the hostel, canteen food is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is one of the best engineering colleges. I recommend students to study here.
reviews.review_text: The college has a library where students issue our coursebook, and there are over 2500 books. The college has 30 classrooms including an e-classroom. The college has 2 conference halls. The classroom has tables and benches and every classroom has a CCTV installed. It has a basketball court and a badminton court, and also has a cricket ground in which the pitch is made up of cement. Every year the college make an annual function but from previous 6 years, and the college is not arranging it.

reviews.review_heading: I think our college is the best for placements. I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Labs and the hostels are great. In the hostels, you will surely have lots of fun with friends. The food system is the best in the college. All labs are fully functional, and it has a great lecture hall. Every classroom has new digital boards, an air-conditioner, and a projector. Medical facilities are good. There are 2 ambulances for an emergency. The canteen is clean. The canteen serves the best quality food at a reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the placements and infrastructure of the campus. The teaching is good.
reviews.review_text: New hostels are well maintained and good at maintaining hygiene. The hostel rooms are quite comfortable compared to other engineering colleges. They give you the choice of choosing rooms, and if you want a room with an attached bathroom, the cost is more. Our hostel has a well-maintained gym.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, you will love to join, study and have a wonderful experience.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is completely Wi-Fi enabled. Labs are well operated with one computer to one student. There are centrally air-conditioned labs. Classrooms are old fashioned, but have huge space and are well ventilated. The library is accessible every day. The hostel is very good actually, and it is also completely Wi-Fi enabled. The food served here is nice.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements offered.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, laboratory, Library, Gym, Sports area like facilities are available in our campus. Talking about the food quality, ne must say it is below average. The canteen facility is good. The medical and sports facilities are decent. This is not a sports centric institute. If you are looking for a sports centric institute, then this is not for you.

reviews_list.review_title: Personally, I am very much satisfied with placements.

review_content.Placements: From our course, around 65% of students get selected through campus drives. The highest package is 10 LPA, the average package is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. reviews_list.review_title: The college is the best place for middle-class students.

faqs.question: Q: Is Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science a known college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E. / B.Tech. in EE/AMIE in ECE/ AMIE (Electronics Telecommunication Eng), AMIETE ( Electronics) & Telematics Engg) (or) equivalent. Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates over TS PGECET qualified candidates. Candidate must have secured 50% marks in group subjects taken together in the qualifying examination (45% for reserved category).MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2003). No maximum age limit.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: TS EAMCET cut off at Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science commonly referred to as KITS varies every year. It varies according to the number of applicants and seats available and the performance in entrance examination. In engineering colleges cut-offs are quite high for popular branches like Computer Science and Electronics. For the latest and the most accurate information, see the KITS official website or the Telangana State Council of Higher Education portal for detailed cutoff lists during the post-admission process. Ensure your scores must be better than the cut-off scored for the previous year, which will be the only method for guaranteed admission.

overview_faqs.question: Is Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science are B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science has a rating of 3.9 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.4, 3.6, 3.9 and 4 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: KITSW Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied. It has the best environment.

content.Placements: Mainly, students from my college got placements from Infosys. Last time, the salary package offered was 20 LPA to my seniors. The lowest salary package offered in my college is 8 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is 14 LPA. Some seniors and my friends got good internships.
content.Infrastructure: It has proper labs, Wi-Fi, and whatever students need. The food in the hostel is good, like in our home. It is more spacious and peaceful. Especially on Wednesday, the chicken served is good. If we have any health issues, then they provide medical facilities properly, and they care for us like their own children.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied to a normal extent with college, placements, and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 50% of students will be placed in my college every year. The companies are Oracle, Accenture, Infosys, Genpact, RealPage, and Cognizant. The highest package till date is 31 LPA, and the lowest is 1 LPA. Some of the students also secured internships in nice companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and has many labs. Wi-Fi is provided for every student. Classrooms are also good with boards and digital boards. Library is too good to study with no disturbance. The food at the hostel is good, and our college is especially good for conducting sports events. Canteen has very good food where samosas are famous in our college. Ambulance facility is also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Personally, I am very much satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: From our course, around 65% of students get selected through campus drives. The highest package is 10 LPA, the average package is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Deloitte, Infosys, Amazon, and Foxconn are the top recruiting companies for our course. About 80% of students receive internship certificates. Top roles include manufacturing and circuit testing.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides awesome facilities such as a huge library, free Wi-Fi hotspots, an auditorium, seminar halls, project labs, an indoor complex, and waiting halls. There are AC and non-AC hostels for students. The food is delicious and reasonably priced in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities are available with a professional doctor. Physical activities, including indoor and outdoor games, are widely available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is the best place for middle-class students.

content.Placements: 75.8 percent of the students got placed through college placements in various companies. The highest package was 6 LPA, the average package was 4 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA from our course. Top recruiting companies like Deloitte, TCS, Foxconn, and Coulryt were included. Nearly 65 percent of students received internship certificates from companies such as IT Solutions Pvt Ltd and Deloitte. Top roles offered were circuit designer and manufacturing roles.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the college were outstanding. The college provided many facilities. It includes AC classrooms, library, free Wi-Fi hotspots, auditorium, seminar halls, transportation, project labs, and radio rooms. The quality of the hostel and canteen was also good. Along with good food and neat, hygienic rooms. Medical facilities were very good, with a professional doctor and ambulance facility. Sports and games were most common thing in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The best faculty and the best facilities are provided by our college.

content.Placements: Placements for our seniors were very good. Highly reputed companies visited our college and recruited our seniors with reasonable packages. The highest salary package offered is 17 LPA. The lowest package was 5 LPA, and the average package was around 7 LPA. Almost everybody from our course 95 percent done their internship. The top roles include leading and managing the team.
content.Infrastructure: When I was in my intermediate, I wanted to take admission in this college by seeing its infrastructure, but it is beyond that. Our college has good buildings and good lab facilities. There is a good playground. I am advising my juniors to take this college infrastructure as a minimum benchmark. The facilities of the hostel were also great, with reasonable fees in both the hostel and canteen. The sports and games are played regularly in the college grounds, and the medical services are available.

admission_process.title: Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in GATE, TS EAMCET, and TS PGECET, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in several specialisations.Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Scienceoffers B.E. / B.Tech at UG level and M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 5,00,000. Aspirants have to payINR 1,00,000 - 1,40,000for PG courses.

faqs.question: What is the TS EAMCET cutoff for Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science?
faqs.answer: TS EAMCET cut off at Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science commonly referred to as KITS varies every year. It varies according to the number of applicants and seats available and the performance in entrance examination. In engineering colleges cut-offs are quite high for popular branches like Computer Science and Electronics. For the latest and the most accurate information, see the KITS official website or the Telangana State Council of Higher Education portal for detailed cutoff lists d

faqs.question: What is the cutoff mark for Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science?
faqs.answer: The cutoff marks for Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science (KITS), Warangal, typically vary based on the engineering branch and the entrance exam, such as TS EAMCET or JEE Main. For TS EAMCET, the general cutoff for most branches ranges from a rank of around 10,000 to 50,000. However, more competitive branches like Computer Science and Engineering may have lower cutoff ranks, around 5,000 to 15,000. These figures can vary yearly depending on factors like demand and student performance

faqs.question: What is the cutoff for admission to MBA at KITSW?

faqs.question: How can I get into Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E. / B.Tech. in EE/AMIE in ECE/ AMIE (Electronics Telecommunication Eng), AMIETE ( Electronics) & Telematics Engg) (or) equivalent.
Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates over TS PGECET qualified candidates.
Candidate must have secured 50% marks in group subjects taken together in the qualifying examination (45% for reserved category).MBA/PG

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science is up to 1452. Good thing to know is that Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

To check the cutoff details for different exams, rounds and categories, refer to the sections provided below. Candidates can check this page to view the Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs across various rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 10383 and 56416 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 10383, 15844 and 21441, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science allows admission to the MBA and MCA programs based on TSICET scores. For admission to Kakatiya Institute of Technology and Science, candidates must meet the required cutoff rank for their respective category and quota. reviews_list.review_title: Honest insights on academics, campus life, cost & career prospects.

review_content.Placements: More than 85 percent of students got placed in our college. The salary package offered is 3 LPA to 8 LPA. Notable companies include Larsen & Toubro Reliance Infrastructure DLF Tata Projects Ltd. Hindustan Construction Company (HCC) Essar Group Jaypee Group and GMR Infrastructure. Additionally 80 percent of students obtain internships annually in various engineering fields. Top roles offered are structural engineering geotechnical engineering transportation engineering and consulting civil engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are available 24/7 and provide a safe and secure environment. The hostel is clean and well maintained with a mess that features a separate dining hall and a well equipped kitchen for student use. The mess serves breakfast lunch evening tea and dinner every day with a weekly menu available from the mess in charge.

review_content.Placements: The management provides full support in placement training. Around 10% of students from my batch students got placed, with an average salary package of 4 LPA- 5 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, I don't know much about hostel. I got to know from my friends that the quality of food in a hostel is not good. Sometimes there are insects in hostel food. In classrooms, Wi-Fi is available, but sometimes there is no access to Wi-Fi.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Most trusted and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: By collecting information from the seniors, in my course, 80% of students got placed. The highest package in my course is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 1.24 LPA. Recruiting companies are TCS, Zoho, Infosys, and Wipro. Mostly at Zoho 50% of students got internships in it. Roles offered in my course are IT, software developer, and data science.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in my course are very nice. Wi-Fi facility is very good. Classrooms are neat and clean. We get weekly once library period. We go to lab atleast weekly 8 to 10 labs, and it is very useful. AC facilities are also available in it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Such a good college and placements are very good. Moreover, the infrastructure is very good.

content.Placements: We are in the final semester. There are about 120 students in my department, and 80 get placed. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top companies are Zoho, TCS, Cognizant, Mindtree, Wipro, Hexaware, and many more. Many are offered internships along with full-time employment.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities available, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a common library, and also a department library. The quality of infrastructure is very good, and the food is good in the hostel. Medical facilities are available weekly once, and a doctor is present on campus at the respective time.

content.Placements: Colleges are providing placement training for students. The companies involved include TCS, Avasoft, Hexaware, and Zoho. admission_process.title: K. Ramakrishnan College of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Ramakrishnan College of Technology admission 2025is open for UG and PG courses. The institute offerstwo coursesatUG and PG levelsi.e.,BTech and MTech.K. Ramakrishnan College of Technologycarried out theonline modeof application. Admission toK. Ramakrishnan College of Technology coursesis entrance-based. The college is affiliated withAnna Universityso they follow the admission norms of the university for admission toBTech and MTech. The following segments are all the information related to theK. Ramakrishnan College of Technology admission, course eligibility, and selection criteria.

K. Ramakrishnan College of Technology admissionto BTech and MTech is based onTNEA counselling and CEETA PGfor BTech and MTech respectively. Eligible candidates can register forTNEA counselling and CEETA exam onlineby visiting their official website. The following table mentionsK. Ramakrishnan College of Technology courseseligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
B.E. / B.Tech
Class 10 and Class 12 with 45% aggregate
TNEA Counselling
M.E./M.Tech
Graduation with 50% aggregate

Ramakrishnan College of Technology admissionprocedure has a multi-step process, which has to be filled out by all the candidates to get admission into the institute. It begins with the application, candidates are required to apply and appear for theentrance exam and counsellingfor their desired course. Find below theK. Ramakrishnan College of Technology admission process2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission to K. Ramakrishnan College of Technology must apply forTNEA counselling and CEETA PGentrance exam for admission to BTech and MTech respectively. Candidates can register themselves by visitingTNEA and CEETA PG official websites.
Step 2: K. Ramakrishnan College of Technology Selection Criteria

After applying for the TNEA counselling and CEETA entrance exam, candidates are required to appear for the same to fill out the selection criteria for admission. Additionally, they must also fill out the basic eligibility criteria which include that UG candidates must passClass 12 with 45% aggregateandPG candidatesmust have agraduation degree with 50% aggregate.
Step 3: Counselling
For admission to BTech course, it is mandatory to appear in the TNEA counselling round. Candidates are required to register on the official website of
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
After the final round, the institute releases the merit list of selected candidates. Candidates are required to submit the admission fee to lock the final seat.

reviews.review_text: The college feels are too high for course. The hostel feels are also too high. It's not for all there also financially poor people are there so it's not good. The hostel food is good only when on fresher joins. I don't recommend my juniors to join hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty members as they are friendly and supportive.
reviews.review_text: The entire college is covered with Wi-Fi facilities. Labs and classrooms have extraordinary infrastructure. Lab facilities are overall good. However, hostel is below average, and food quality is poor. When freshers join,  food is good initially, but quality deteriorates over time.

reviews.review_heading: K Ramakrishnan College of Technology Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. I would recommend this to others. The food is good, but sometimes bad. At first, when I joined the hostel, the food was good. But after several days, the menu was not good and the quality was also a little bit low. The library is open even on Sundays.

reviews.review_heading: KRCT is a very good institution with fully loaded labs and techs. They provide a good placements.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to infrastructure, there are two college summonses in the single compound; they are KRCE and KRCT. The environment was very clean and full of gardens. The hostel food was average, and there are spacious rooms for the hosts, and the rooms were cleaned by the organisation called Zolo.

reviews.review_heading: Really satisfied with faculty, coaching, and good placement records.
reviews.review_text:
Our college has good infrastructure with strong WiFi and environmentally friendly classrooms with hi-tech laboratories.
The hostel has very good surroundings around it. Rooms are well organized on each floor with all facilities. Food in the canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college at an affordable fee.
reviews.review_text: All kinds of labs are available in our college. The infrastructure of the hostel is very good. The food served in the hostel is average. The hostel facilities are good. It provides good Wi-Fi. We can play games in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of K. Ramakrishnan College of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in each classroom. Each laboratory has an ethernet port. Each department has many labs. Each classroom has Wi-Fi and a projector. The CSE lab is air-conditioned. The hostel contains more than 100 rooms for boys and girls. Each room contains 4 beds. Around 4 students are allowed in each hostel room. Our college provides facilities for sports like hockey, football, cricket, etc. We can play games after college hours.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had good placements every year, and I am satisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and the whole department are Wi-Fi enabled. There are separate labs for all departments. All labs are high-tech. Classrooms are very clean. The library of our college is modern, and all departments have a separate core library. All games are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I hope that if you study here you have a bright future.
reviews.review_text: Department wise lab facilities are available. Clean and neat hostel facility with good environment. Hostel fees was 20000 and mess bill was seperate. Always clean and neat hostel facility food was also too hygiene. Clean and pleasent environment. Seperate rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of college events and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in labs with good internet connectivity, and other departments like mechanical and civil also have very good labs and good machinery. In my college, the library is neat and has good infrastructure. The classrooms are very good and neat. When we talk about the hostel, the hostel rooms are neat, and the staff will clean the floor every day. But the hostel food is a bit worst sometimes.

reviews.review_heading: Totally my college is above average.
reviews.review_text:
My course is achieved A+grade in Naac.
So don't worry about infrastructure there is good lab facilities, library, classrooms.
Hostel facilities is very good, and mess and canteen food is average there is good medical facilities and sports, games are very good.

admission_overview.college_name: CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) admission 2025 is open for all the courses. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based. The college offers BTech, MTech and MBA courses at UG and PG levels.CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College)conducts an online mode of application for all the courses. To get admission, candidates are required to fulfil the criteria set by the college. All the information related to CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) admission along with courses is available in the below article:

CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) courses admission is open. The institute offers BTech, MTech and MBA at the UG and PG levels. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based. However, the college also offers 30% of seats via management quota. Admission to the management quota is based on the last qualifying exam score. Check outCMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) courseeligibility & selection criteria in the following table:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry as optional or any other examination recognised by the Government of Telangana
TS EAMCET/ Merit* + Counselling
Graduation degree in Engineering/Technology
AMIE/AMIETE or similar qualifications recognised by UPSC as equivalent to B.E./BTech
GATE/TS PGECET/ Merit*+ Counselling
Graduation degree with 45% aggregate
TSICET/ Merit* + Counselling
*Note: 30% of seats are offered via Management quota.
Download:CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) Broucher

CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) admission process contains various steps, including registration, selection, and fee payment for final seat confirmation. Admission is open for all courses. Given below are the step-by-step details for CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) admission 2025:

STEP 1: CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) Application Process 2025Candidates must fill out the CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) admission eligibility criteria and selection criteria for all courses. After that, candidates are required to fill out the application form online on the official website of the college.STEP 2: Selection RoundCMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) offers admission to candidates on 70% of seats via entrance exam score. Further, the college reserves 30% of seats for the management quota. The college offers 70% seats under Convener Quota via TS EAMCET, GATE/TS PGECET and TS ICET forBTech, MTech andMBA, respectively. Additionally, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria for a particular course to be eligible for direct admission via management quota.STEP 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee SubmissionFor final seat allotment, the college releases the merit list on its official website. After candidates get shortlisted based on their merits, they are required to pay theCMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) feeto lock in their seats.

courses_data.description: CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) offers a 4-year full-time BTech programme. For admission to 70% of seats, the college offers admission based on the TS EAMCET score followed by counselling. Further, 30% of seats are offered via management quota, admission to this is based on the last qualifying exam score i.e. passing Class 12 with 50% aggregate in group subjects (Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry). The college offers four specialisations under BTech, such as BTech in Computer Science & Engineering, BTech in Electronics & Communication Engineering, BTech in Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML) and BTech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science). faqs.answer: CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) offers direct admission for 30% of its seats through the Management quota. placement_data.title: CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The placement process at CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students. The final placements at CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) are a result of very systematic interaction with the industry and continuous career counselling of the students.

As per the latest report, CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) has concluded the placements for the batch that passed out in 2024. As per the latest report, 652 students of the batch 2024 were placed during the CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) placements in 2024. Out of the total students placed, 110 were from the MBA batch 2024. A total of 66 recruiters participated during CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) placements in 2024 and offered handsome packages to the students. Some of the top recruiters of CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) in 2024 include PayPal, Amazon, Sutherland, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, HSBC, SAP, Autorabit, etc.
Earlier, CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) placed 605 students from the 2023 batch. Out of the total students placed, 164 were from the MBA batch 2023.

cut_off.college_name: CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: CMR Technical Campus cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

CMR Technical Campus TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 24122 and 28322 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first roun

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 24122, 24156 and 27677, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to CMR Technical Campus. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The CMR Technical Campus MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 14666. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 17396, and the 2023 cutoff was 11509 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.
Check the table below to know the year, round, category and quota-wise cutoff.

hostel_campus.college_name: CMR Technical Campus (Autonomous Engineering College) Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: CMR Technical Campus is well known for placement.
reviews.review_text: The college had all the essential facilities and infrastructure required for our course. Wi-Fi facility, library with well stocked collection of books. Hostel quality was also decent, sufficient to survive. Food in the mess and canteen was good. Medical Support was provided by the college. Sports and games were encouraged by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with decent facilities.
reviews.review_text: I have visited many colleges. Their infrastructure is insane compared to ours. However, at the end of the day, both provide almost the same facilities. Wi-fi is good. Smart boards are available. Lab equipment works in most cases.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements and a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The college atmosphere is good, and the infrastructure is good. The classrooms are neat with comfortable benches. The computer labs are good. The Wi-Fi facility is available. We have a huge library. The hostel facilities are good. The canteen is also available. The sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Represents the CMR Technical Campus, Kandlakoya.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-notch, our classrooms are vast and clean, and the Wi-Fi is very fast. The library has a vast collection of books. Our hostel is very high-standard and maintains discipline, and the medical facilities are very good, and we also get other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are very good. We have visual classrooms and labs, which help the students get a better experience. The food quality in the hostel and canteen is very healthy and tasty. The college has a good library which helps to get knowledge from different books.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good. The facilities in the college labs and classrooms are good. The visual classes help the students to understand very easily. The food facilities and quality are very healthy and tasty. The sports in college give a well entertaining experience.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are very good. We have visual classrooms and labs which help the students get a better experience. The food quality in hostel and canteen is very healthy and tasty. The college has a good library which helps to get knowledge from different books.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the college facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are very good. We have visual classrooms and labs which help the students get a better experience. The food quality in the hostel and canteen is very healthy and tasty. The college has a good library which helps to get knowledge from different books.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. We have visual classrooms and labs with the best facilities. These facilities help students to get a better experience in their studies. Facilities in the hostel are good. Food quality is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I was satisfied in this college as per the subject knowledge, but they should conduct more events.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available and has no access to students' devices. When we come to labs, there is high maintenance for labs, and in the classes, they are also very neat and clean. The library is also very calm. The quality of the food in the canteen is very tasty, and the medical, sports, and games facilities are okay.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and supportive campus environment.
reviews.review_text: The college provides many good facilities. There are five blocks in total. Three blocks are for B.Tech students, one block is for MBA, library, and auditorium, and another block is for sports. In the hostel, the food is good, and the canteen is also good. The college has its own hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CMR Technical Campus.
reviews.review_text: There are good books and journals in our library, and we can read them daily. My college has a gym, a canteen, a library, and some sports grounds outside and inside. Hostel timings are from 6:00 a.m. to 5:30 p.m., and campus timings are from 9:20 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. In Nagar College, popular hangout places include the cafeteria.

reviews.review_heading: CMR Technical Campus Autonomous.
reviews.review_text: We can participate in any clubs in our department; we have a robotics club and an innovative club. By participating in those clubs, we will get a certificate. Our college also conducts annual days and technical festivals every two years, and the library generally contains a wide range of books. Our classrooms are very large. Around 70 members can easily sit in our classroom, and our college also offers sports and other extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: The college education and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The classrooms and labs are clean. In the labs, they provide each student with a computer, and the Wi-Fi signal is also good for doing work and research. The hostel is on the college premises only, which is an advantage for students to avoid wasting time.

reviews.review_heading: CMR technical campus is autonomous.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very beautiful and it is a very big place. We have so many classrooms and labs, and one big, well-stocked library with AC. We have Wi-Fi available at any time in the college. We have hostel facilities and bus facilities available for both hostelers and day boarders. We have so many canteens and clinics.

admission_overview.college_name: Aditya Institute of Technology and Management Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Aditya Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Aditya Institute of Technology and Management admissions 2025 are open. The college offers admission to full-time BTech, MTech and MBA courses. AITAM admissions 2025 are bothmeritandentrance-based. The college accepts state-level entrance exams such asEAMCET, ECET, ICET, GATEandPGCET.AITAMalso offers direct admission through Management quota. More details around Aditya Institute of Technology and Management admission are as follows:

AITAM admissions are merit and entrance-based. Candidates must fulfil the minimum eliigiblity for respectiveUG & PG courses. As per the selection criteria, the 70% of the seats are filled through entrance exam scores, while the remaining seats are filled through Management quota. Check below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for Aditya Institute of Technology and Management course admission:
70% seats-AP EAMCET
30% seats- Guidelines stipulated by APSCHE, Guntur
70% seats-APICET
30% seats- Through Management quota
70% seats-GATE/AP PGECET
30% seats- Through Management quota

Aditya Institute of Technology and Management admission process is both merit and entrance-based. Check out the detailed steps for admissions at Aditya Institute of Technology and Management in the section below:
Step 1: Application Process

For admission through Management quota, candidates must apply online on the official website of AITAM and fill the admission form. However, other candidtaes must apply for the respective entrance exams.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

AITAM admissions are conducted in two ways. A total of 70% seats are filled through scores obtained in the respective entrance exams. Further, the 30% seats are sanctioned through Management quota. For entrance-based admissions, aspirants need to qualify for entrance exams such as EAMCET, ICET, GATE and PGECET for respective UG & PG courses. Moreover, the college offers direct admissons as per the guidelines of Government of Andhra Pradesh (APSCHE)
Step 3: Final Admission
After the completion of all selection rounds, candidates must pay a certain fee to confirm their seats.

Check below the list of accepted entrance exams for AITAM UG & PG courses:Course NameAccepted Entrance ExamsBTechEAMCETBTech (Lateral Entry)ECETMBAICETMTechGATE/ PGECET

faqs.question: How to get admission to Aditya Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: To get admission to AITAM UG & PG courses, candidates must go through a multi-level admission process. The college offers admissions based on several state-level entrance exams for respective courses. However, direct admissions are valid through Management quota for 30% seats. Check below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for AITAM course admissions:Course NameEligibilitySelection CriteriaBTechPass Class 12 with Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry as major70% seats- EAMCET30% seats- Guidelines stipulated by APSCHE, GunturBTech (Lateral Entry)Diploma and BSc holdersECETMBAGraduation in the relevant stream70% seats- ICET30% seats- Through Management quotaMTechGraduation in the relevant stream70% seats- GATE/PGECET30% seats- Through Management quota

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG & PG courses at Aditya Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: Aditya Institute of Technology and Management fees for various UG & PG courses range between INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 8.1 lakh. The lowest fee is given for M.Tech course, whereas the highest fee is for BTech programme. Candidates must pay for various components as part of the AITAM fee structure. It includes Tuition Fee, Hostel Fee, Application Fee and more. Check below the Aditya Institute of Technology and Management tuition fee for top courses:Course NameTuition FeesBTechINR 2.2 Lacs - INR 8.1 lakhMTechINR 1.2 lakhMBAINR 1.3 lakh

faqs.question: How many seats are available for MBA programme at AITAM in 2025?
faqs.answer: The MBA programme at Aditya Institute of Technology and Management offers a total of 60 seats for admission in 2025. There is no specialisation offered in MBA programme at AITAM. Seats are distributed between merit-based quota and the management quota.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for AITM MBA course in 2025?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for AITM MBA course in 2025 can cost around INR 83,000. Tuition fee is paid in installments at the beginning of each academic year. Other than tuition fee, AITM total fee also includes admission charges that is paid at the time of enrollment. The examination fee may be paid on a semester basis.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at AITAM?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MBA at AITAM is INR 1.3 lakh . Apart from the tuition fee, candidates must also pay for components such as Hostel Fee, Application Fee, etc. However, t his information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

hostel_campus.college_name: Aditya Institute of Technology and Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is available for both boys and girls.There are two boys hostels and two girls hostels. Each hostel is having a telephone, T.V., internet facility, sports items, water coolers, water heaters and well equipped mess facilities. All the hostels provide independent mess facility and serve both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food.

library.description: The central library has a wide collection of over 42,495 books, 3149 CD's and cassettes and several national and international periodicals.The library also provides access to a wide range of electronic and print resources.The books are classified and arranged according to the Dewey Decimal Classification (DDC) scheme and “Open Access” system is followed . The Library has a computerized Catalogue. Books are issued to students and staff with bar-coding system.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volley Ball, Table Tennis, Handball Court, Kho-Kho Court, Ball Badminton Court, ThrowBall(Women), Tennikoit Court

library.description: The central library has a wide collection of over 42,495 books, 3149 CD's and cassettes and several national and international periodicals.The library also provides access to a wide range of electronic and print resources.The books are classified and arranged according to the Dewey Decimal Classification (DDC) scheme and “Open Access” system is followed . The Library has a computerized Catalogue. Books are issued to students and staff with bar-coding system.

cafeteria.description: AITAM has a Canteen with good facilities. Tiffins, snacks, tea and lunch will available here. Foods provided in our canteen will be tasty as it is the same food prepared for hostels too. Both vegetarian and Non-vegetarian items are available in canteen. All varieties of cool drinks will be available in our canteen.

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is available for both boys and girls.There are two boys hostels and two girls hostels. Each hostel is having a telephone, T.V., internet facility, sports items, water coolers, water heaters and well equipped mess facilities. All the hostels provide independent mess facility and serve both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volley Ball, Table Tennis, Handball Court, Kho-Kho Court, Ball Badminton Court, ThrowBall(Women), Tennikoit Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Review of AITAM College for the CSE course.
reviews.review_text: There are separate classes for every section in each course. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. We have a good central library which has a huge capacity for people. The food available in the canteen is good. I don't know much about the hostel because I am not a hosteller. We have a health centre on campus.

reviews.review_heading: You will definitely be satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Overall hostel is good, and food is also good. Wi-Fi is also available in the hostel. Some other facilities like washing machines, medical, etc., are available. A fully equipped library is available on the campus. Girls can access library till 7:00 PM, and for boys upto 9.00 PM.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for studying, with infrastructure, and for maintaining hygiene.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for my course. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are very good. Hostel facilities are better, and the quality of food in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I feel very good about my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, not bad. The Wi-Fi on campus is okay, and labs’ equipment and data connection are good. The library is good in our college. The quality of facilities on campus is very good. Hostel maintenance and medical facilities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good with facilities. It maintains hygiene.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for my course/ department are Wi-Fi and classrooms. Here, classrooms are very clean. The quality of facilities in my hostel is better. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good. It also provides medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My college infrastructure and atmosphere are very good. It is hygienic and clean.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are available. The quality of facilities in my hostel is better. The food in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with my college for now.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available at our college are very good. They will provide a good Wi-Fi connection, and the classrooms are good and clean. Coming to the library, there is a good one in our college. Our hostel, I think, is really good when compared to others. They will provide clean and hygienic goods for us.

reviews.review_heading: My college is overall really good.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities with library, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms not bad, hostel facilities are good with Wi-Fi and rooms not bad, the campus has no fight issues as fines are imposed, and college has cafes and ice cream facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Know about that college AITAM.
reviews.review_text: Labs and infrastructure are very good. Wi-Fi is also good but sometimes it doesn't work for mobile. The labs are so good, and the equipments are also good. But in some labs, there is not sufficient equipments that will be upgraded. Canteen facility is also good. We have sports periods three times a week.

reviews.review_heading: Some faculty members are not bad. But the placements are average.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi has a low signal. Labs are pretty good, and classrooms are little bad. The library is too good. It has AC rooms, and they provide computers for doubt clarification. Medical facilities, sports, and games are pretty good, but the facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: The review from the recent pass-out student in 2025.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-designed, and the college environment is excellent. The college management has a separate department for new idea development to help students and upload the idea to the government website, like MSME, for funding.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aditya Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the university plays a critical function in its development, as students are now focusing on the labs, lecture rooms, etc. It also has health and wellness facilities. It has excellent hostel facilities, offers top-notch food to students, and maintains a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Joining in the college is good, don't expect big placements.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good, with new blocks constructed featuring beautiful infrastructures. The library is excellent, offering an abundance of books perfect for studying. The quality of food in the canteen is poor sometimes, though it is good at other times, but sometimes it's the worst. Hostel facilities and hostel food are okay.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available in our college. College has good internet and has seminar halls with AC. There is a separate library block in our college and have so many books. Those are very helpful for the students and staff to gain knowledge and have different types of text books. Food is good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aditya Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college plays a vital role in the development of the college, as students are now focusing on the labs, classrooms, etc. It also has health and wellness facilities. It has good hostel facilities. It provides top-notch food to students and also maintains a good environment.
