paragraphs: Yes, Aditya Institute of Technology and Management offers scholarships mainly under three categories. Under the scholarship schemes, college grants financial assistance to meritorious students. The scholarships are as follows:

AITAM provides scholarships to the deserving MBA students. Under the Pragati Scholarship Scheme for girl child, students are awarded INR 50,000/- per annum for a maximum of 4 years. The eligibility set follows that the girl should be admitted to the first year of degree level course. This scholarship is provided by AICTE and facilitated by the institute.

The total tuition fee for MBA at AITAM is INR 1.3 lakh. Apart from the tuition fee, candidates must also pay for components such as Hostel Fee, Application Fee, etc. However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our college gives the best education and skills.

review_content.Placements: I am currently in my 3rd year. My super seniors got normal jobs in companies. But still, our college management is trying to give the best jobs to the students. 40 percent of students were placed in my college. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The best thing about my college is the hostel. They provide two different types of food, like northern and southern style food. I have tried both types of food, but North-style food is better than South-style. I can give 4 stars out of 5 stars to my college hostel facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Colorful campus and opportunity to grow

review_content.Placements: I joined in September. In our class there are 60 students and many other sections. I have heard from seniors that the average package is around 3 to 4 LPA. Mostly small and midfirm companies are coming and intership is not so mandatory. It mostly will depend on our skills and our willingness to learn.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi is available and a full network. Computer labs are there for learning communication and presentation. Classrooms have AC and best seats to attend classes. I am not a hosteler but I have eaten once. I did not like it so much. Good enough to live. Sports facilities are the best. You can play basketball cricket tennis and coaches are there. A small hospital is there for small health issues.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2029

courses.overview: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Paralakhemundi Courses & Fees 2025 Students can choose from various course options available at Centurion University. overview_faqs.question: Is it worth joining Centurion University of Technology and Management?
overview_faqs.answer: Centurion University of Technology and Management provides good placements to its graduating students. Check out the table below to know the key highlights of the Centurion University of Technology and Management placements:Particulars Placement Statistics (2023)the highest PackageINR 13.6 LPAMedian PackageINR 4 LPAStudents achieving more than INR 9 LPA48Total Recruiters348Placement Rate90%Note- The placement report for season 2024 and 2025 are not released as of yet.

review_summary.college_name: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Paralakhemundi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is good, but the infrastructure needs to be improved.

content.Placements: About 100 percent of the seats were occupied by my batch this year. The highest package offered is 6.5 LPA (average) and the lowest is 3.6 LPA. I am a fresher, so I do not know anything about other questions. The package thing was recommended by a senior. Overall, it is good.
content.Infrastructure: There is a digital classroom with internet service. Quality is good, but not satisfactory. Food quality is average. Sports and games are good. There is no Wi-Fi on my campus. There is no proper management. The management needs to improve, especially the low-ranking staff.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Centurion University review.

content.Placements: The placement in our course was the best among all courses. The placement percentage was around 85–90 percent. The highest package was also secured by our course only, i.e., 22 LPA. The average package was around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Accenture, Deloitte, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facilities, a library, and modern classrooms were available. Computer labs, laboratories, and workshops were well equipped with instruments. Hostel quality was also good. Sports and games were encouraged by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our college gives the best education and skills.

content.Placements: I am currently in my 3rd year. My super seniors got normal jobs in companies. But still, our college management is trying to give the best jobs to the students. 40 percent of students were placed in my college. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The best thing about my college is the hostel. They provide two different types of food, like northern and southern style food. I have tried both types of food, but North-style food is better than South-style. I can give 4 stars out of 5 stars to my college hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Colorful campus and opportunity to grow

content.Placements: I joined in September. In our class there are 60 students and many other sections. I have heard from seniors that the average package is around 3 to 4 LPA. Mostly small and midfirm companies are coming and intership is not so mandatory. It mostly will depend on our skills and our willingness to learn.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi is available and a full network. Computer labs are there for learning communication and presentation. Classrooms have AC and best seats to attend classes. I am not a hosteler but I have eaten once. I did not like it so much. Good enough to live. Sports facilities are the best. You can play basketball cricket tennis and coaches are there. A small hospital is there for small health issues.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and fantastic infrastructure, but the hostel mess food is just average.

content.Placements: For our BBA batch, the placement rate is quite high, officially around 90%. The salary packages have a wide range. The highest package goes up to 13.60 LPA. The median package is 4.00 LPA. On average, most students receive offers between 2.5 LPA and 3.5 LPA, with the lowest packages being around 1.5 LPA. Our top recruiting companies include major banks like ICICI, HDFC, and Axis Bank. As well as IT companies like Accenture, Wipro, and Cognizant. Almost everyone, 60-100 percent, manages to get an internship as it is a key part of our course.

admission_overview.college_name: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Paralakhemundi Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

admission_process.title: Centurion University Paralakhemundi Admissions Process 2025

paragraphs: Centurion University Paralakhemundi admission 2024is online and offline. Centurion University of Technology and Management (CUTM), through eight schools, offers UG, PG, and other courses to students across Engineering, Management, Science, and other streams. Admission to various UG, PG, and other courses is based on merit and scores secured in entrance exams. At the UG level,Centurion University Paralakhemundioffers four-year BTech, four-year BSc, three-year BCA, BBA, and other courses to students.

At the PG level, the university offers two-year MBA, MSc, and other courses to students. To get admission to any courses students are required to complete the eligibility and selection criteria set by the college for admission. Want to know more about Centurion University Paralakhemundi admission, along with course-wise eligibility, selection criteria, seat intake, fees and admission process:

Students seeking admission are advised to check the course-specific eligibility conditions before applying. The final seat allotment is done only for students who meet eligibility and selection criteria. To confirm admission, selected candidates have to pay some amount of the course fees at the time of admission. The table presentsCenturion University Paralakhemundi coursesalong with course eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Maths 50% and 5% relaxation for reserved category
CUEE+ Counselling
Bachelor's degree from a recognised university
Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Maths/Biology with 50% aggregate
CUEE + Counselling
BSc in respective disciplines from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 in Physics, Chemistry, Maths/Biology with 45% aggregate
CUEE BPharm+ Counselling

Centurion University Paralakhemundi feeis a sum of multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Coming to affordability is one of the strong reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible. However, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check below the total tuition fee, and average package for top Centurion University Paralakhemundi courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Centurion University Paralakhemundi seat intakevaries course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for top Centurion University Paralakhemundi courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Centurion University follows a process for admissions to its various courses. Each aspirant goes through the admission stages till the final seat allotment. Largely, the admission process involves an application process, entrance examination, counselling, and admission confirmation. Details on each of these admission stages are provided below for a better understanding of the students:
STEP 1: Centurion University Paralakhemundi Application Process2024

Candidates willing to get admission to Centurion University can apply forCUEEfrom the official website with an option to pay and submit the form online or pay and submit the form offline. The aspirants opting for the online application method are required to visit the official website of the University(www.cutm.ac.in).

After the completion of registration, the University will conduct the CUEE exam. Applicants are required to appear for the exam at the notified test centre. Qualified applicants will be called up to take provisional admission by depositing a minimum admission fee via cash/DD at the University campus or online on the website.
STEP 2: Shortlisting Students

Centurion University Entrance Examination (CUEE) is conducted by Centurion University, Odisha for admissions to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The online remote-proctored test is a 3-hour long exam. The students with a valid score and meeting the cutoff are called for the next round of admission. For MTech courses, national-level exams, andGATEscores are accepted for shortlisting students.
STEP 3: Counselling

Candidates who score greater than or equal to the cutoff marks in the entrance examination have to participate in theCUEE counsellingprocess for admissions. The counselling is conducted in offline mode. The selected students have to report to the counselling venue and fill out their preferred courses. The seat allotment is done based on the candidate's merit, preference and availability of seats.
STEP 4: Admission Fee Payment & Seat Confirmation
After the final seat allotments, selected students can pay some amount of the admission fee and confirm their seats. The amount required to be paid can be confirmed by the university officials.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Balasore CampusReviewed on 30 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good, but the infrastructure needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: There is a digital classroom with internet service. Quality is good, but not satisfactory. Food quality is average. Sports and games are good. There is no Wi-Fi on my campus. There is no proper management. The management needs to improve, especially the low-ranking staff.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 30 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Centurion University review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facilities, a library, and modern classrooms were available. Computer labs, laboratories, and workshops were well equipped with instruments. Hostel quality was also good. Sports and games were encouraged by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives the best education and skills.
reviews.review_text: The best thing about my college is the hostel. They provide two different types of food, like northern and southern style food. I have tried both types of food, but North-style food is better than South-style. I can give 4 stars out of 5 stars to my college hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Colorful campus and opportunity to grow
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi is available and a full network. Computer labs are there for learning communication and presentation. Classrooms have AC and best seats to attend classes. I am not a hosteler but I have eaten once. I did not like it so much. Good enough to live. Sports facilities are the best. You can play basketball cricket tennis and coaches are there. A small hospital is there for small health issues.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 15 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements and fantastic infrastructure, but the hostel mess food is just average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our BBA course is excellent. All are smart classrooms with projectors, smart boards, and reliable Wi-Fi. The entire campus, including the hostels and library, is Wi-Fi enabled. The central library is very large. It has a great collection of books and digital resources. The hostels are also well-maintained, with separate ones for boys and girls. Students can choose between AC and non-AC rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 14 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: You will enjoy the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good, and I recommend you visit it as there are lots of places like the butterfly garden, gram tarang, etc. Wi-Fi is here, but don't rely on it as they have less network speed. The library is here, but it doesn't have new books, all are old. The hostel is very bad, I heard it, but I don't know that much because I am a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at CUTM - Paralakhemundi.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, especially the library, which is very large and consists of 1000s of books, and it is environmentally friendly. The hostel is pretty decent, and can adjust. Food quality is also okay. Sports infrastructure is very good, but they will get very little time to play.

reviews.review_heading: Sneak peak into Agriculture.
reviews.review_text: Centurion University has a well-developed academic infrastructure. Lecture halls and classrooms are spacious, with many being smart classrooms, equipped with projectors, digital boards, and high-speed Wi-Fi covering nearly the entire campus. The university has separate hostels for boys and girls, including AC hostels, with multiple mess halls. Rooms are shared (often 3-5 students), with attached bathroom in many hostels.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 8 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Also a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is the best. There are many types in our college. A big ground, a volleyball court, a gym area, and a swimming pool are available in the college. The classroom is completely AC and very spacious.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 17 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with the college. Infrastructure, facilities, faculty members, and all are good.
reviews.review_text: Every possible facility is available in the college as well as the hostel. Food is good, Wi-Fi was available, and the Lab was also very useful. They also have an option available of AC luxury in a hostel that was value for money. I also chose the luxury one, and all the facilities were good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 23 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is recognized as one of the best skill institutions in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: College is set in a peaceful and green environment, making it a pleasant place to study. The hostels are well-maintained, with spacious rooms and all necessary facilities provided. Hostel wardens are also very cooperative and ensure students feel comfortable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 14 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and better jobs are provided by our college.
reviews.review_text: Our department boasted well-equipped laboratories, smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and access to a huge library. The hostel provided neat rooms, hygienic mess, and 24x7 medical attention. There are cricket, football, and indoor games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with the placement cell in 2024-2025.
reviews.review_text: College has good buildings and infrastructure, but class have no Wi-Fi facilities. There is a central library that has Wi-Fi support. There is a dispenser for first aid support. Facilities to play cricket, basketball, volleyball, and football are available. Hostel rooms are decent, but the mess food is not worth it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 18 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College has strong practical learning and infrastructure, but faculty availability needs improvement
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are highly maintained, and Wi-fi is available. The library is also provided in our college. The college hostels are good, but the food quality in the mess is not good. In the CUTM, they have a big sports complex.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 31 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Value of money for students.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi facilities, and the labs and halls are air-conditioned. There are plenty of computers available on campus, and they are all well maintained. Different types of hostels are available; if you want air-conditioned rooms, they are available, and attached bathrooms are also an option.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Centurion University of Technology and Management, Paralakhemundi

college_info.college_name: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Paralakhemundi Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar offers scholarships based on prior academic record during admission, as well as semester-wise performance for subsequent years. Candidates from different boards of education receive a pre-defined percentage of scholarship on their fees. The scholarship percentage is based on the scores obtained in the previous academic level. From the second year onwards, candidates must maintain a minimum of 8.0 CGPA in their semester exams, along with a minimum of 80% attendance, to continue with their scholarship.
In addition to these scholarships, Centurion University also offers various scholarships to reserved and minority category students. Some of the scholarships available are:

- PRERANA post-matric scholarship for SC/ST/OBC and SEBC District Welfare Office (Odisha)- Minority scholarship from the District Welfare Office (Odisha)- National scholarship- Jindal Foundation scholarship (Sitaram Jindal)- Times of India scholarship- Ministry of Human Development (DHE) New Delhi- Bihar Welfare (Post-Matric) SC/ST/OBC and Minority- BEML scholarship (SC & ST)- FAEA scholarship (SC & ST)- Bihar Welfare (Technical Stipend)- E-KALYAN scholarship offered by Jharkhand State Welfare Department- Departmental/ Official scholarship from East Coast Railway/ CRPF/ Central Schools/ SBI/ Coal India/ Daitari Mines/OMC for their wards.

To get admission to Centurion University Paralakhemundi candidates are required to meet the eligiblity set by the university. The eligibility criteria for MBA is, graduation in ay discipline with CUEE score/rank. Centurion University BBSR offers many specialisation in MBA with the duration of two years in full time mode. faqs.question: Q: Which courses does E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College offer?

faqs.answer: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College, Tamil Nadu, is one of the well-reputed institutions for quality engineering education. Several under graduate and postgraduate programs are available to students there as it is affiliated with Anna University. There has long been an eagerness to join this college as it has experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and emphasis on practical training in labs and workshops. E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College boasts a great placement record because a large number of students get absorbed into the most competitive companies related to almost every sector. The college also encourages students to participate in extracurricular activities and research to mold them for better engineers.
faqs.question: Q: Is E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College good?

overview_faqs.question: Is E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College good?
overview_faqs.answer: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College, Tamil Nadu, is one of the well-reputed institutions for quality engineering education. Several under graduate and postgraduate programs are available to students there as it is affiliated with Anna University. There has long been an eagerness to join this college as it has experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and emphasis on practical training in labs and workshops. E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College boasts a great placement record because a large number of students get absorbed into the most competitive companies related to almost every sector. The college also encourages students to participate in extracurricular activities and research to mold them for better engineers.

overview_faqs.question: Is E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College has a rating of 3.6 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.62 on Campus Life, 3.32 on Placements, 3.88 on Faculty and 3.49 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College is around INR 35000 - INR 200000.

review_summary.college_name: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Okay, good, but some staff are in favor of someone.

content.Placements: Only 50% of students get placed in my batch. They have offered jobs to every person, but the jobs are not related to the course. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. This is very low for my course. They do not concentrate on internships for my batch.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is okay, but I do not recommend the hostel. There is no Wi-Fi available for students. Mobile phones are not allowed on campus. The sports facilities are good. The canteen food is good, but the canteen space is very small for the entire engineering campus. It is not good at all.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: E. G. S. Pillay Engineering College is one of the best engineering colleges.

content.Placements: E. G. S. Pillay Engineering College's placement is good. This college has a strong placement training cell. They brought more than 15 companies for campus interviews. Reliance Construction, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc. These companies visit this college for recruitment. 90% of students are placed in reputed companies. The highest salary package is 8 LPA. The lowest salary package is 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: E. G. S. Pillay Engineering College has more laboratories and classroom facilities. This college has well-equipped library facilities. This college provides hostel facilities for boys and girls. The hostel food tastes good. Multiple sports ground facilities are also available here at this college. This college provides Wi-Fi network facilities across the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College For B.E. / B.Teach CSE admission in 2025.

content.Placements: This college provides the best salary package for every student. The salary package offered by the companies ranges from 4-8 LPA. This course is very good to get the salary package. Students should score above 70% in academics to participate in this course placement. Companies like TCS, Wipro, etc., provide internships in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides very high-quality products and multiple facilities like classrooms, labs, library, fast Wi-Fi, bathroom, canteen, etc. The hostel facility is available. Canteen facilities are available, and it provides the best quality of food.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: EGS Pillay Engineering College Review

content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placement offers. Placements are based on the branch; circuit branches offer awesome placement opportunities, while core branches have decent placements. The highest package was 53 LPA. Top recruiters are Oracle Academy, IBM, AutoCAD, TCS, Bosch, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi facilities 24/7 in the hostel and college campus area. The library is also available on the campus. paragraphs: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College considers scores in GATE, CEETA, and TANCET for admission to specific courses.E.G.S. Pillay Engineering Collegeoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,65,000 - 2,00,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 35,000 - 50,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Yes, students get direct admission to E.G.S Pillay Engineering College. The college offers direct addmission only for those students who have passed the 12th class. faqs.question: What is the median package of B.E. / B.Tech course that is offered by Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar?

faqs.answer: A:    After completing an M.Sc. from the Silicon Institute of Technology (SIT) Bhubaneswar, students have strong opportunities in diverse fields like data science, embedded electronics, IoT, VLSI, and more. They can pursue careers in technology roles, leadership positions, or research-based projects, especially with companies that recruit actively from SIT. SIT has partnerships with numerous high-profile companies, including Accenture, Amazon, Infosys, and SAP Labs, offering job placements and i
faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing M.Sc. from Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar?

faqs.answer: A:    Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar offers median package range of INR 410,667 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance programme and has been rated 4 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.
faqs.question: What is the median package offered at Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar during placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, M.Sc. and MCA. Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar fee structure for all the courses is around INR 2,70,000 to 8,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar goes up to 957.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to its M.Tech programs, Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar, recognizes legitimate entrance exam results. Scores that match legitimate GATE, OJEE, and/or OJEE PGAT scores are regarded as accepted. CUET-PG scores are also accepted for admissions purposes. Following their selection based on those results, candidates will be given consideration for counseling in order to be assigned a seat. With an emphasis on both theoretical and practical skills in engineering and technology, the two-year M.Tech programme provides a variety of postgraduate specializations.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar for admission M.Tech.?

faqs.answer: A:    The admission to the B.Tech programs in Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar, is through scores generated from the JEE Main and OJEE, the Odisha Joint Entrance Examination. Thereby, only good performances at these entrance tests would make students eligible for counseling and seat allotment. It emphasizes merit-based admission; only competitive examinations of these institutions supported students' selections. Admission also involves the counseling process conducted under OJEE, which makes the final choice of candidates for various engineering specializations presented at the institute.
faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar for admission to B.Tech.?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and good placements from 2019, but not good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is 75-80%. They secured job offers. The salary packages varied from year to year. The highest package till now is 32.5 LPA. The average package is 5.16 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, Capgemini, Amazon, DXC Technology, Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, and IBM. 272 internship offers were made, with a stipend ranging from Rs. 8,000 - 60,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel but in some classrooms it is available. Hostel has AC and also non-AC rooms, a water cooler, washing machines, network routers, water heaters, etc. The quality of the mess and canteen food is not the best but good compared to other colleges. Doctors are available in the hostel for 1-2 days per week. Badminton courts are available in all hostels and other courts are available outside the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Above average, according to the fee, not bad.

review_content.Placements: Good, to be honest, considering the college fees are around Rs.12 lakhs, which might have increased now that it's a university, it's still pretty good for a tier 3 private college. Most people get placed. Only those with backlogs or poor academics don't get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are quite good for CSE students. We get AC rooms for CSE students from the 2nd to the 4th year, but ECE, EEE, and EIE students don't get AC rooms, as there are very few AC rooms in the ECE building. AC hostel rooms are good, with 24/7 electricity and water supply.

Candidates must have cleared Class 12 with subjects like Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry/Biology. Selection for admission is through online registration as well as counseling conducted by OJEE. Although this is merit-based, the competition varies from branch to branch. As a whole, however, it is accessible, but the rank needed to secure a seat has to be met.

overview_faqs.question: Is Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar is a reputed institute for B.Tech, Ph.D., M.Sc., MCA, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 4 on placements, 4.4 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Silicon Institute of Technology in Bhubaneswar is generally a good college, particularly with respect to the placements and faculty. The placement record of the college is pretty good with average packages ranging between INR 4 to 6 lakhs per annum and the highest package till date was somewhere around 32 lakhs per annum. Campus recruits continuously happen from TCS, Wipro, Tata Power, and the students have got an average placement of around 80-90 %.Students love the faculty and the atmosphere supportive of learning. Reviews, however, do reflect that infrastructure is lacking in a few of them. On the whole, however, the Silicon Institute of Technology is very much a decent institution where a student can take engineering studies. It is more favourable towards the engineering streams with respect to its training of students according to industry requirements.

review_summary.college_name: Silicon Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure of hostels and classrooms, and clean surroundings.

content.Placements: 70 to 80% placement Package 8 Lack to 24 Lack per annum and many of the companies like wipro tata naada and may other companies you can attend the seminars ehich give you some brief information about the company and you will able to get the information what things you are going to face un future.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good and you can enjoy a lot. Free Wi-Fi is also available, and you can gain a lot of knowledge. The library is also there, which is a very peaceful and silent place where you can read books, and there are many magazines, so you can learn a lot.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Strict about academics and good placement record.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed last year. The average package was 5–6 LPA. After every semester, a summer internship is compulsory for every student. An aggregate of 8 CGPA is needed to sit for placements. The level of exams is moderate. Some top recruiters are TCS, Wipro, Accenture, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is small, and the infrastructure is good according to the campus size. Hostel rooms are clean and spacious.
content.Faculty: Teachers are well-qualified and very helpful and cooperative. The teaching quality is good. The mid-term is conducted before the end-term, which is of 20 marks. Then the end-term is conducted, which is 50 marks. There are 10 marks for attendance and 20 marks for teacher assessment, making a total of 100 marks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and good placements from 2019, but not good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is 75-80%. They secured job offers. The salary packages varied from year to year. The highest package till now is 32.5 LPA. The average package is 5.16 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, Capgemini, Amazon, DXC Technology, Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, and IBM. 272 internship offers were made, with a stipend ranging from Rs. 8,000 - 60,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel but in some classrooms it is available. Hostel has AC and also non-AC rooms, a water cooler, washing machines, network routers, water heaters, etc. The quality of the mess and canteen food is not the best but good compared to other colleges. Doctors are available in the hostel for 1-2 days per week. Badminton courts are available in all hostels and other courts are available outside the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Above average, according to the fee, not bad.

content.Placements: Good, to be honest, considering the college fees are around Rs.12 lakhs, which might have increased now that it's a university, it's still pretty good for a tier 3 private college. Most people get placed. Only those with backlogs or poor academics don't get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are quite good for CSE students. We get AC rooms for CSE students from the 2nd to the 4th year, but ECE, EEE, and EIE students don't get AC rooms, as there are very few AC rooms in the ECE building. AC hostel rooms are good, with 24/7 electricity and water supply.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The disciplined environment and focus on students.

content.Placements: Placements for the EEE department are exceptionally fabulous, with a 100 percent placement rate. SIT has a strong track record of placements, with a significant percentage of students securing positions in reputable companies annually. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Mindtree and Byju's. The average package ranges from 5 to 6 LPA with the highest packages reaching up to 32 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Great infrastructure, with advanced equipment available for students in every laboratory. Hostels provide clean and hygienic food and washroom facilities. Our food menu is decided by students which is an extraordinary feature for students of Silicon. The campus is equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi. Hostels provide comfortable accommodation with necessary amenities. However, some students have suggested improvements in medical facilities and food quality in the mess and canteen.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: Admission to the Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar is relatively less problematic, mainly on the basis of rank acquired in OJEE or JEE Main. Candidates must have cleared Class 12 with subjects like Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry/Biology. Selection for admission is through online registration as well as counseling conducted by OJEE. Although this is merit-based, the competition varies from branch to branch. As a whole, however, it is accessible, but the rank needed to secure a seat has to be met.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar goes up to 957.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar for admission M.Tech.?
faqs.answer: For admission to its M.Tech programs, Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar, recognizes legitimate entrance exam results. Scores that match legitimate GATE, OJEE, and/or OJEE PGAT scores are regarded as accepted. CUET-PG scores are also accepted for admissions purposes. Following their selection based on those results, candidates will be given consideration for counseling in order to be assigned a seat. With an emphasis on both theoretical and practical skills in engineering and technology, the two-year M.Tech programme provides a variety of postgraduate specializations.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct admission is available at Silicon Institute of Technology (SIT) Bhubaneswar for certain categories of students, primarily through the Management Quota. Students who do not qualify through the Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) or the Odisha Joint Entrance Examination (OJEE) may still apply for management quota seats.

placement_data.title: Silicon Placement overview
paragraphs: Silicon Institute of Technology has successfully concluded its placement drive for the batch passing out in 2022. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered to BTech students during Silicon Institute of Technology placements 2022 stood at INR 33 LPA and 5.1 LPA. Further, the highest package offered to MCA and MSc Data Science students stood at INR 7.5 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively . The participating recruiters presented 1,080 job offers to BTech students and 135 jobs to MCA students during the placement process 2022. The top recruiters of the Silicon Institute of Technology in 2022 included Adani Group, JSW, Accenture, TCS, Amazon, Infosys , etc.

In addition to offering placement opportunities to the students, the placements wing of the college looks after the training of students on a continuing basis. In 2022, 221 internship offers were provided to the students of BTech course.

Students can check the article in this space for more details around the Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar rankings.

rankings.highlight: 12th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Orissa In 2025

nirf.description:
Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

hostel_campus.college_name: Silicon Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure of hostels and classrooms, and clean surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good and you can enjoy a lot. Free Wi-Fi is also available, and you can gain a lot of knowledge. The library is also there, which is a very peaceful and silent place where you can read books, and there are many magazines, so you can learn a lot.

reviews.review_heading: Strict about academics and good placement record.
reviews.review_text: The campus is small, and the infrastructure is good according to the campus size. Hostel rooms are clean and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and good placements from 2019, but not good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel but in some classrooms it is available. Hostel has AC and also non-AC rooms, a water cooler, washing machines, network routers, water heaters, etc. The quality of the mess and canteen food is not the best but good compared to other colleges. Doctors are available in the hostel for 1-2 days per week. Badminton courts are available in all hostels and other courts are available outside the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Above average, according to the fee, not bad.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite good for CSE students. We get AC rooms for CSE students from the 2nd to the 4th year, but ECE, EEE, and EIE students don't get AC rooms, as there are very few AC rooms in the ECE building. AC hostel rooms are good, with 24/7 electricity and water supply.

reviews.review_heading: The disciplined environment and focus on students.
reviews.review_text: Great infrastructure, with advanced equipment available for students in every laboratory. Hostels provide clean and hygienic food and washroom facilities. Our food menu is decided by students which is an extraordinary feature for students of Silicon. The campus is equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi. Hostels provide comfortable accommodation with necessary amenities. However, some students have suggested improvements in medical facilities and food quality in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: A value for money, a return on investment, a strict, disciplined, and academically strong college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is small, with limited facilities in a small area. The authorities are strict, with strict rules. There is less campus life, and not many events take place. On a small campus, you do not know what you will enjoy. There are very few events and a smaller crowd, which can be good and bad. There is less social exposure, as students from other colleges don’t visit often. Although the campus is lush green, it is clean.

reviews.review_heading: As I invested more so, I got that much more. That is a placement that everyone needs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Well-equipped classrooms and labs are there for us. Each classroom has Wi-Fi installed, so there are no interruptions in the network. The library area is very calm and a proper environment for studying, with AC and non-AC rooms available as per the needs of students, along with Wi-Fi. Our hostels, for both boys and girls, have clean and hygienic rooms, corridors, and washrooms. Water and electricity are available 24/7. A lift is also installed, as ...

reviews.review_heading: My college life at Silicon university.
reviews.review_text: The college has nice infrastructure but the campus is \small or else the campus environment is so good. We have a central library and a Skylab where students can access free Wi-Fi. We have different academic buildings for computer science and engineering, electronics and communication engineering, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, facilities, and studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are quite good. Hostel facilities are amazing, as many of my friends live in the hostel. The college organizes many events and sports for students to participate in and gain knowledge from. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Silicon University - Do join for studies and memories.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel, but it is available in the library, some classrooms, and Skylab. Food is average in the hostel. There are great opportunities for sports and games. College also has medical facilities. If you don't wish to eat in the canteen you can eat at the cafeteria.

reviews.review_heading: Silicon Institute is a good institute with a comfortable environment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel structure is pretty good with a lot of facilities like a gym, sports ground, etc. There are two types of hostels, One is AC and the other one is non-AC, and we can choose as we like. Wi-Fi is available everywhere and we can access it. Labs are quite good with well-managed desks and chairs. We can run our computer there. Classrooms are neat and clean. In the summer season, we get AC classrooms. Labs are good and have every equipment we need.

reviews.review_heading: A great place to learn about life, and you will grow as a human in this place.
reviews.review_text: Everything was available. Facilities were good. Hostel rooms were good, and you will enjoy them. Sports complex was there, focus on studies, and everything else was gonna be alright. Gym and other amenities were also available. Go for it, and it was worth it. I would recommend this to everyone. Sports were good and other clubs were nice.

reviews.review_heading: An amazing university where career is crafted.
reviews.review_text: College has a nice infrastructure with Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus and smart labs. Classrooms are also great in every aspect. College has a big common library for the students where there are various books to read and to do research about.

reviews.review_heading: Silicon University: A comprehensive review of education and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Silicon is modern and as per the needs of students. Campus has labs in various engineering departments. Classrooms are spacious. There is a dedicated exam hall, training hall, skill development, and many more. The college library is well stocked by good collection of books, research papers, and journals. Free Wi-Fi is available on campus. Two canteens, serving vegetarian and non-vegetarian food, and one cafeteria are available on campus. Food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, facility and studies.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are excellent in the college. I think it lacks medical facilities; other than that, it is amazing. The facilities in the hostel are amazing, but the quality of food available in the mess and canteen can be improved. The infrastructure for sports and games is very good.

NIT Andhra Pradesh offers a wide range of UG and PG programs through its various departments, including Biotechnology, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, School of Humanities & Management, and others.
BTech is a popular programme of the National Institute of Technology, AP. It offers BTech course in 8 fields, such as Biotechnology, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, etc.This is a four year course. For the General AI category, the overall cutoff fell between 16537 and 22270 for the BTech CSE course. On the other hand, for the General HS category, the CSE cutoff ranged from 17114 to 17500. reviews_list.review_title: This college is best for your future build-up.

review_content.Placements: About 74% of students get placed in this college, with 44 LPA being the highest package at that time. The lowest is 5 LPA, and the average package for placed students is around 8 LPA, with top companies like MNC, Infosys, and L&T. About 95% of students receive internship opportunities as part of the recruitment process.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is excellent for computer science programming, with numerous computer systems provided and well-known technicians available. Wi-Fi is accessible, and classrooms are digital. The library is fully air-conditioned and has a wide selection of books. The quality of food in the mess is very good. The medical facility is available for students with a van who take it to drop at the door.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of NIT Andhra Pradesh - National Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: 75% of students get placed in this course. The highest package this year is 35 LPA and the lowest package is 6 LPA. The average package is 8.5 LPA. Some recruiting companies like TCS, Amazon, Ola, etc., visit the college for placements. Many students got internships in various companies like Microsoft, ISRO, etc. Some roles offered after this course are software engineer, VLSI engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are large classrooms which are capable of fitting 90-100 students at a time. Classrooms are fitted with smart TVs, blackboards, and whiteboards. It provides various laboratories for work. Hostels are very neat and new. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel with good connectivity. The food is hygienic, healthy, and tasty. A 24x7 medical facility is available. A various number of grounds are available for sports. A canteen is also there on the campus.

The fee structure at NIT Andhra Pradesh is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of NIT Andhra Pradesh admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. overview_faqs.answer: NIT Andhra Pradesh is one of the eminet institute which offers quality education to the students. The institute has vibrant campus life for the students. The institute organises the cultural events to motivate the students to take part in various events an dshowacase their talent. review_summary.college_name: NIT Andhra Pradesh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Campus infrastructure is very good. Hostels and mess are best.

content.Placements: 70% of students got placed. The highest package is 15 LPA. Average package is 6.3 LPA. The lowest package is 5 LPA. Recruiting companies are Larsen & Toubro, Reliance Industries, Hindalco, JSW Steel, and Raam Group. 80% of students got internships. Coding and editing are very good.
content.Infrastructure: Lab is good. Modern facilities are available. Hostel rooms are 4-seaters. There are 3 fans with full light. Mess is good, and canteen is available 6 days and Sunday is off. Medical facilities are available 24X7, and sports are good. College is free upto one lakh medical treatment for one year. Students are 1st priorities for system. Almost 30 clubs are available, and library is very good. Student life is perfect.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely, a very good college for placements.

content.Placements: Around 80-90 percent of students got placed. The highest package ranges from 10-12 LPA, and the lowest package ranges from 2.52-3 LPA. The average package ranges from nearly 4.52-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies, such as TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and several local tech startups, hire students. The common roles offered are software developer, support engineer, data analyst, and intrum training positions.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has a good computer lab, spacious classrooms, and a library with enough books for study. The campus is also very neat and well-maintained. Classrooms have a projector for teaching, smart boards, and green boards. Labs have a required system for software.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for your future build-up.

content.Placements: About 74% of students get placed in this college, with 44 LPA being the highest package at that time. The lowest is 5 LPA, and the average package for placed students is around 8 LPA, with top companies like MNC, Infosys, and L&T. About 95% of students receive internship opportunities as part of the recruitment process.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is excellent for computer science programming, with numerous computer systems provided and well-known technicians available. Wi-Fi is accessible, and classrooms are digital. The library is fully air-conditioned and has a wide selection of books. The quality of food in the mess is very good. The medical facility is available for students with a van who take it to drop at the door.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of NIT Andhra Pradesh - National Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: 75% of students get placed in this course. The highest package this year is 35 LPA and the lowest package is 6 LPA. The average package is 8.5 LPA. Some recruiting companies like TCS, Amazon, Ola, etc., visit the college for placements. Many students got internships in various companies like Microsoft, ISRO, etc. Some roles offered after this course are software engineer, VLSI engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are large classrooms which are capable of fitting 90-100 students at a time. Classrooms are fitted with smart TVs, blackboards, and whiteboards. It provides various laboratories for work. Hostels are very neat and new. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel with good connectivity. The food is hygienic, healthy, and tasty. A 24x7 medical facility is available. A various number of grounds are available for sports. A canteen is also there on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of NIT Andhra Pradesh - National Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Last year, the placement percentage was around 86%. The highest package is 44 LPA, and the minimum package is 8 LPA. Mostly, around 70% of students get internships in their companies depending upon the respective branch. Mostly, my branch students mainly concentrate on the GATE and government exams, and people with computer skills shift to software jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The library is very nice and new. It contains all books, different publications, and newspapers. The Wi-Fi connection is extraordinary. The quality of the food is above average. The canteen food is good and somewhat expensive. The hygiene is good. Sports and games tournaments are conducted in different NITs every year. Mother Theresa Health Center is available at the college, but all facilities are not provided.

faqs.question: Is JEE Main required for admission to NIT Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.answer: NIT Andhra Pradesh admission to BTech courses are conducted through JEE Main. The Admission to different courses is conducted by national-level entrance tests likeJEE Main,GATE, and so on. Final seat distribution is carried out viaCCMN,CCMT, and other counselling sessions. Only JEE Main results are accepted by NIT Andhra Pradesh for admission to its BTech programme. As a result, individuals can apply to NIT Andhra Pradesh for admission to a variety of programs, except for BTech, without taking the JEE Mains.

faqs.question: Is an entrance exam needed for course admission at NIT, Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.answer: The entrance exam depends on the choice of course. For example, for BTech, the institute accepts JEE Main. For MTech, GATE os required. Students can visit the official website to know more.

placement_data.title: NIT Andhra Pradesh Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: NIT Andhra Pradesh saw a placement rate of 74.55% in 2024 drive. The highest package offered during NIT Andhra Pradesh placements of 2024 was INR 44.1 LPA . The average package offered during the placement drive was INR 7.24 LPA . More than 174 recruiters visited the NIT Andhra Pradesh campus for placements. A total of 361 job offers were offered to the students of the batch 2024. Google, Amazon, Infosys, Wipro, IBM, Samsung, TCS, Accenture, Tech Mahindra, Oracle, Sony, Nvidia, etc. were top recruiters of NIT Andhra Pradesh .

NIT Andhra Pradesh has a Training and Placement Cell. The Cell invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The NIT placement depends on various factors such as the brand value of the institute, industry demand, skills of the students, etc.

description: NIT Andhra Pradesh cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIT Andhra Pradesh JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of NIT Andhra Pradesh JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

NIT Andhra Pradesh JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIT Andhra Pradesh CSE cutoff 2025 was 22270 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 30034 and 57486, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating comp

For the General AI category students, the NIT Andhra Pradesh B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 22270 and 91366 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 22270 and 30034, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIT Andhra Pradesh. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIT Andhra Pradesh to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIT Andhra Pradesh. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Data Analytics and M.Tech. in Geotechnical Engineering with last round cutoff scores of 460 and 363, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 460. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 304 and 420 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at NIT Andhra Pradesh - National Institute of Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

NIT Andhra Pradesh also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech and BArch admission. Candidates seeking admission to NIT Andhra Pradesh can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs for the General category students:

Considering the last round of NIT Andhra Pradesh CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Data Analytics and Geotechnical Engineering, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Advanced Communication Systems and Signal Processing and Power Electronics and Drives had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

hostel_campus.college_name: NIT Andhra Pradesh Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Campus infrastructure is very good. Hostels and mess are best.
reviews.review_text: Lab is good. Modern facilities are available. Hostel rooms are 4-seaters. There are 3 fans with full light. Mess is good, and canteen is available 6 days and Sunday is off. Medical facilities are available 24X7, and sports are good. College is free upto one lakh medical treatment for one year. Students are 1st priorities for system. Almost 30 clubs are available, and library is very good. Student life is perfect.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, a very good college for placements.
reviews.review_text: Our department has a good computer lab, spacious classrooms, and a library with enough books for study. The campus is also very neat and well-maintained. Classrooms have a projector for teaching, smart boards, and green boards. Labs have a required system for software.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best for your future build-up.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is excellent for computer science programming, with numerous computer systems provided and well-known technicians available. Wi-Fi is accessible, and classrooms are digital. The library is fully air-conditioned and has a wide selection of books. The quality of food in the mess is very good. The medical facility is available for students with a van who take it to drop at the door.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Andhra Pradesh - National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: There are large classrooms which are capable of fitting 90-100 students at a time. Classrooms are fitted with smart TVs, blackboards, and whiteboards. It provides various laboratories for work. Hostels are very neat and new. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel with good connectivity. The food is hygienic, healthy, and tasty. A 24x7 medical facility is available. A various number of grounds are available for sports. A canteen is also there on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Andhra Pradesh - National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The library is very nice and new. It contains all books, different publications, and newspapers. The Wi-Fi connection is extraordinary. The quality of the food is above average. The canteen food is good and somewhat expensive. The hygiene is good. Sports and games tournaments are conducted in different NITs every year. Mother Theresa Health Center is available at the college, but all facilities are not provided.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure and is value for money.
reviews.review_text: For every course, there will be a smart board in the class, so that faculty members can explain things easily. There are a total of 10 labs in our department. For every semester, students have to perform two labs. In the library, there is a separate section for our course and also for others. Wi-Fi is provided in the library. The menu of mess is good. The quality of the food is not bad. In hostels, there are many facilities like geysers, free Wi-Fi, tables and chairs but there is no washing mach...

reviews.review_heading: It has a nice campus, and it will be more beautiful in the upcoming years.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice. There are two laboratories on campus. Electrical engineering labs have almost all the equipment. There is AC in the lab, and it also has a good network connection. Some classrooms do not have AC, but the remaining classrooms have AC. There is a good network connection in both the hostels and classrooms. There is one library which is full of books. We can issue books through registration or by machines. The taste of the food in the canteen is very nice. Mess food ...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good. There is Wi-Fi facility in hostel. All the hostel rooms and washrooms are cleaned daily. Hostels are maintained neat. College also has indoor and outdoor sports facilities and a gym. Hostel food is average, sometimes good sometimes average. There is also a separate block for medical facilities. All the staff are friendly in manner.

reviews.review_heading: Real and Raw Review of NIT Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are well-maintained, but the Wi-Fi here is not so good; it stops working quite a few times. The classrooms are well-equipped with air conditioning, as the temperature here is too high in summer. Talking about the mess, food is good on some days, but on most days, it is below average. For studying and books, the BR Ambedkar Library is open from 9 AM to 12 AM. Medical facilities are provided in Mother Teresa Hospital. Sports facilities are good. A cricket stadium, badminton court, basketba...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good NIT for students who want to pursue B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, but it is under construction as many areas of the college are vacant. The college head made some desire building which is helpful for us. A lot of facilities are provided by the hostel authority, like a cooler, lift, washing machines, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with placements in 2024, but it has decent infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Decent infrastructure and facilities when compared with other colleges. As it was a newly established institute, we have decent infrastructure, with new hostel blocks when compared with other institutes. The quality of food available in the mess is not so good, but it was okay.

reviews.review_heading: The review of NIT Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are very neat and they maintain the hostels very properly and they provide Wi-Fi in the hostel and the classes are very small and they provide many sports facilities like inter NIT sports and the canteen called Dokka Settama will be there in the college.

reviews.review_heading: New college and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available to us are excellent. Since the college is newly constructed, the construction is up-to-date and gives a good vibe. Classrooms and the library are up to the mark, with all the facilities like smart boards in classrooms, AC in the library, etc. Wi-Fi is also decent. The quality of the facilities at the hostel is above average, but the food available in the mess is below average. There is a medical center and a gymnasium. Outdoor and indoor sports complex...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely disappointed with the placements in 2024, and no proper director is the greatest flaw.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, and maintenance is very good. Mess food will be better; you have to adjust for it. Canteen food tastes good, but the quantity for the amount is very less. Medical facilities are good enough, and sports and games are conducted actively. However, most games cannot be seen by most of them as they are conducted during lecture times.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to save your future, then please avoid this college.
reviews.review_text: In the mess, it is impossible to find hygienic and edible food. Students eat in the mess just because the canteen in this college is more expensive than a restaurant. Every year, the same people get contracts through corruption. I think the situation of Wi-Fi and network in the jungle is better than this college. Every semester, students pay extra fees but get nothing from the institute.

data.description: The faculty members are very knowledgeable and hold PhD or at least M.Tech degrees from reputed institutes in India. NIT Andhra Pradesh has recruited 43 regular faculty members to supplement and strengthen the teaching process and 100 Ad-hoc faculty members also serve the institute. Most of the faculty members have doctorates and NIT Andhra Pradesh provides a good academic ambience for the teaching-learning process.

paragraphs: The fee structure of NIT Andhra Pradesh is not very expensive and is affordable for the students. The fee structure for the NIT Andhra Pradesh course ranges between INR 75,000- INR 5 lakh. The multiple components of the fee structure include tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee.
No, the fees for courses lies between 1.4 and 5 lakh. Thus, we cant say its expensive. It offers good education at affordable fees.

NIT Andhra Pradesh provides many need-based and merit-cum-means scholarships, as NIT Andhra Pradesh is committed to making higher education affordable and accessible to all deserving students, merit cum means scholarships are offered on the basis of the performance and The need-based scholarships are offered to students who come from economically disadvantaged backgrounds and require financial assistance to meet the cost of their education. The scholarships are granted based on income group.

A:    Cummins College of Engineering for Women, Pune has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.
OR

review_summary.college_name: Cummins College of Engineering for Women, Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall review of Cummins College.

content.Placements: The placements are excellent. Being an all-girls college, the crowd is smart and awesome, too. B.Tech in ENTC has good placements too, but the thing is you have to make a choice between software and hardware or both, and then keep working on it asap. Maintain your CGPA.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is a little small, but overall, the vibe is good. Also, there's a college hostel provided, but it's not available for locals. The food in the hostel is average, and no breakfast is provided. You'll get to learn a lot of things, and there are many hostel facilities apart from this too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: We have good teachers who help you all the time; we have good placements almost every year.

content.Placements: In my course, more than 80% of students got placed. The highest package is 50 LPA, the average is 13.5 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Google, Microsoft, Wells Fargo, and SAP. The percentage of students who got internships was 40%, which were at Texas Instruments. The top roles offered are data analytics, embedded design, and SDE roles.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by the college are good. Wi-Fi and smart classrooms, which have projectors or sensor boards, are available. The college also provides reading and discussion halls for studying. The library has good books for different subjects and also offers other books for reading. I am a local student, so I don't go to the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: About department of electronics and telecommunication engineering.

content.Placements: College got united by the placement training which was common to all the department final-year students. Special care was showered by the departmental placement head, and so core-oriented companies like HAIL, Philips Electronics Limited, and Dell were shown their participation in the recruitment process.
content.Infrastructure: College looked like an integrated campus but was separated from one another by various departments. All the departments offered B.Tech and M.Tech courses, and their enrollment may differ from one another. There will be departmental libraries, departmental events, and all will come under a single administration process.

individual_reviews.title: Four year course in the college located at Pune.

content.Placements: The college shares a wide range of opportunities and also shares information about the usage of the job platform to grab the best offers.
