content.Infrastructure: Even after graduation, alumni are invited to the college once every 5 years, and create a good bond with the alumni and the students of the current year. College is updated with the newer technology, with better coordination, which is highly appreciated.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Instrumentation and Control Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Massive moderate companies arrived for placements.

content.Placements: I got placed in the company of IFM Electronic with a very minimal package of 3.1 LPA. I got this offer by undergoing the pressure training given by the college. Later this job didn't work out for me for long, but with such experience, I joined Omron Electronics with a good package.
content.Infrastructure: College is a demonstration for all colleges, so all courses are offered at better standards. This college shaped the lives of thousands of students in a good way. There will be a lot of resources available for studying which would be accessible to all students studying over here.

description: Cummins College cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Cummins College JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Cummins College cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 14602 and 26029 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 14602, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 14602.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

The second most competitive course was M.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering With Specialization in Artificial Intelligence.

reviews.review_heading: Overall review of Cummins College.
reviews.review_text: The campus is a little small, but overall, the vibe is good. Also, there's a college hostel provided, but it's not available for locals. The food in the hostel is average, and no breakfast is provided. You'll get to learn a lot of things, and there are many hostel facilities apart from this too.

reviews.review_heading: We have good teachers who help you all the time; we have good placements almost every year.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are good. Wi-Fi and smart classrooms, which have projectors or sensor boards, are available. The college also provides reading and discussion halls for studying. The library has good books for different subjects and also offers other books for reading. I am a local student, so I don't go to the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: About department of electronics and telecommunication engineering.
reviews.review_text: College looked like an integrated campus but was separated from one another by various departments. All the departments offered B.Tech and M.Tech courses, and their enrollment may differ from one another. There will be departmental libraries, departmental events, and all will come under a single administration process.

reviews.review_heading: Four year course in the college located at Pune.
reviews.review_text: Even after graduation, alumni are invited to the college once every 5 years, and create a good bond with the alumni and the students of the current year. College is updated with the newer technology, with better coordination, which is highly appreciated.

reviews.review_heading: Massive moderate companies arrived for placements.
reviews.review_text: College is a demonstration for all colleges, so all courses are offered at better standards. This college shaped the lives of thousands of students in a good way. There will be a lot of resources available for studying which would be accessible to all students studying over here.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this course in our college.
reviews.review_text: The college has a higher tendency to hold a massive number of students. College have their own standards to compete with any other colleges around them. Usually, college management forces the students to participate in all the inter-college competitions happening around.

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech in Computer Engineering.
reviews.review_text: College supports students' interests and helps us in our elevation to the next level. If we face any problems in the hostels, like water scarcity, nutrient-poor foods, we should immediately report to the specified representative appointed in the hostel. The fees charged for accommodation in hostels are undoubtedly expensive.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Cummins College of Engineering for Women, Pune.
reviews.review_text: College gave priority to producing determined students with dignity and self-discipline. The college also arranges funds for the students who are involved in searching and other social activities. Roaming here and there on the college campus without any proper reasons leads to punishment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for placements and academics.
reviews.review_text: It’s a standardized college providing excellent education to thousands of students. The college creates a vintage feel with proper guidance provided to all the students. There are automatic cafes and other setups arranged for the benefit of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Studying CSE at Cummins College is my journey.
reviews.review_text: The college has a nice campus for the CSE course. There is Wi-Fi all over the campus. Labs, library, and canteen are also there. These things are in good condition and helpful for students. Classrooms are clean and have projectors for better learning. The hostel and many sports activities, too, like cricket, football, and indoor games. Students can enjoy and relax after classes.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive teachers, excellent placements (2023-24), great infrastructure, and holistic growth.
reviews.review_text: Mess food is delicious. Everything is available in the college like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. Teachers use the smart boards which are really helpful for us as they make us understand the topic more easily. There are different activities that are done for a better understanding of the topic.

reviews.review_heading: More than satisfied and grateful for having studied at this college.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 hostels in our college, Baya Karve Hostel and David Hostel. Each has different fees and facilities. For Baya Karve Hostel, the fee is around 1.2 lacks per year and for David, it is 1 lacs per year. For this fee, there are facilities like Wi-Fi, filtered water, and 2-time food. The college campus is very good. There are sophisticated classrooms and labs. Digital learning boards and projectors for teaching purposes are there. Inside the college campus, there is a canteen named Suswad C...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Cummins College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are four buildings, each for Instrumentation, Computer, IT, and Mechanical. Wi-Fi is available in all the classrooms and the library. The canteen offers good food that is hygienic and nutritious. There is also a medical room and a sports playground is provided as well.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and college placements are provided at Cummins College.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is very nice. The campus is very nice. It is full of nature and trees. The hostel provides a mess also. Many activities are conducted by the hostel. Every festival is celebrated in the hostel. A mess is very nice and clean. The taste of the food is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Absolute reality of Cummins staff and the college.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available, and there is a common library. The books that should be added for instrumentation and control engineering are not there; the quantity of books should be increased. The labs are okay, but they also need to improve the performance of the PCs available in the labs.

placements.overview:
UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 1654 students were admitted at Panimalar Engineering College and 1776 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 1776 students 1397 were placed with median salary of INR 401988 and 269 students opted for higher studies. A total of 1570 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Panimalar Engineering Collegeand 1572 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 1572 students 1183 were placed with median salary of INR 400000 and 67 students opted for higher studies.

PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 189 students were admitted at Panimalar Engineering College and 182 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 182 students 162 were placed with median salary of INR 400000 and 10 students opted for higher studies. A total of 204 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Panimalar Engineering Collegeand 177 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 177 students 146 were placed with median salary of INR 400000 and 2 students opted for higher studies.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Panimalar Engineering College offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Panimalar Engineering College courses are offered to students in offline mode. Further, the fees structure for Panimalar Engineering College courses stands around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Panimalar Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is good only for students who are coming to study or else this is not the place.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed in our course is good. I do not know about the highest and the lowest packages. The average package is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys, Capgemini, etc. Roles offered in our course are semiconductor, networking, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and the library facilities are good in our department. The college is neat and environmentally friendly. We have Wi-Fi in college, but students cannot use it. We have only a mess, not a canteen. We also have medical and sports facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Strong infrastructure & supportive faculty. Industry relevant AI & curriculum.

review_content.Placements: 40 to 50 percent of students are placed from this course. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest package offered is 6LPA and the average package offered is 4 LPA Cognizant, IBM, Infosys, Tech industry Hero, Tata, and Cognizant. 50 to 60 percent of students got internships from this course. Top roles are Designer Programmer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus provides high speed Wi-Fi access across academic blocks, labs, and hostels. Dedicated to big data, analytics, and visualization. Central library with thousands of volumes, journals, and digital resources. Hot and cold water supply, laundry services, and common rooms with TV and reading halls.

faqs.question: What is the schedule for TNEA Counselling at SRM Easwari Engineering College?
faqs.answer: TNEA Rank List for various categories is out on the official website of TNEA. To check ranks candidates must login using the username and password. Grievances Redressal option is available till June. Further, the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE) Tamil Nadu released TNEA counselling dates and details. Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) counselling registrations are ongoing, whereas the general TNEA Counselling process will start in July.TNEA counselling process includes registration, assignment of random numbers, certificate verifications, rank list publication, and finally the counselling. The counselling rounds will include steps like Choice Filling, Allotment, Confirmation of Allotment, and Reporting to the College/ TFC and payment of fees depending upon their confirmation.

faqs.question: How can I get into Panimalar Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Panimalar Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and good environment.

The hostel facilities are good, and the food is good. The canteen is also available. The sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: The overall college has been good in placements for the past 2 years.
reviews.review_text: In the college, there are facilities like an idea lab where we can do our project presentation and make projects. Two libraries are present in the college. Three mess facilities are present here. Our college gives more importance to sports quota students. Medical facilities are awesome here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Panimalar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and laboratories are very well-equipped with high-end technologies and smart rooms. Many AV halls and seminar halls are available for every department. Many labs are available for every department. Libraries are also available for each and every department in addition to the two central libraries. We have a separate mess for vegetarian and non-vegetarian food. Hostels are provided with facilities like a gym, sports, smart, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with a good environment.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good; it is on more than 50 acres of land. The ground is very large, and the facilities are good. The college provides morning breakfast and snacks, as well as afternoon lunch for day scholar students. The college is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am really satisfied with the quality and the good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and a bookshop. Facilities available in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machines, CCTV, food, and TV. The food in the canteen is nice, with reasonable prices and quality. Medical facilities are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I like my college, because it provides good placements. It has great infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an advanced and well-structured infrastructure. In the hostel, the fee structure depends on the room category, like 2 sharing, 3 sharing, and facilities provided. We have sports tournaments at the college level. There is an open space and an auditorium where cultural events are held every year.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: The college has separate gents and ladies' hostels. Students are provided spacious rooms with attached bathrooms and running hot and cold water. The hostel offers spacious and large play courts and playgrounds for volleyball, basketball, shuttle, badminton, gymnastics, and yoga classes. The mess food quality is also super and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our department are good and neat. There is good equipment in the department. There are good labs with good equipment required for students. The network connection is good, fast, and enough for students.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with friendly staff feels like a school and offers good placement training.
reviews.review_text: The food in the mess is good, the hostel now has free Wi-Fi, and labs are in good condition. The library has all the books needed for students. The mess is kept clean, and the campus is cleaned multiple times a week. The hostel rooms are cleaned daily.

Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.

overview_faqs.question: Is PES College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: PES College of Engineering is a well-known institution for M.Sc, B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, PES College of Engineering has a rating of 3.86 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.03 on Campus Life, 3.27 on Placements, 3.78 on Faculty and 4.16 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: PES College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My journey with PESCE family.

content.Placements: As our college is an autonomous college affiliated with VTU. We have many campus placements as there will be more companies coming to our college to pick students for their companies. Our college has a very good placement history in the core and IT sectors too. But they will train us very well to make sure that we get placed in a good company by training us.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is the best. We have good hostel facilities and security system for students. We have Free Wi-Fi supply for students in the hostel. Our labs are well maintained and have well advanced equipment for the purpose of studies and practice. We have a good library facility too. Our library has a very good collection of books.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: People are good in my college, but the faculty members are very poor at explaining.

content.Placements: The placement is very low, and those who get placed get placed at 3.5 to 5 LPA. The best packages go for like 8 to 10 LPA, which is not so good. Infosys, Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant, and TCS are the main companies involved. There is a very low percentage of students who get real internships; most of them get them in their last year, just because. The students who get internships are the ones who get it based on their skills and themselves through the connections they make at events. SDE, UI/UX Developer, and Data Science will be offered when we graduate.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Life in PES College of Engineering, Mandya.

content.Placements: As in any college, the number of placements has decreased in our college too, still there are a few who are getting placed in good companies like Capgemini. Many are placed in TCS and many more. Placement department is conducting new programs like Super 100, iOS training, and many more programs to train students for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Department is good the intake is 60 per year in ISE, and facilities are also good. Wi-Fi facility is provided throughout our campus, little problem with it in the hostel. Library is also good, we can take 3 books from there at a time. Canteen is average. Hostel is not so good for non-native students because most of the dishes are local food itself, and the rooms are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has good placements and is well-maintained.

content.Placements: I think it may be 100%. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies include Infosys, MNCs, etc. Around 70% get placed in internships. The top roles offered are in Robotics, VLSI, and Embedded Systems. Students who get placed in this course have high-paying jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our department are good. The classrooms are well-maintained. Labs are well-established. The hostel is also good, but the food is not as much as I want. The sports facilities are very good. The canteen on campus is well-maintained. We also have medical facilities in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am thankful to our college for allowing us to participate in technical events.

content.Placements: The top role offered in our college is software development. Recently, the highest package is 21 LPA. The average salary package is about 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Tricon, IBM, Capgemini, Accenture, and Cognizant. Around 80% of students got placed in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite old but it is improving now. In washrooms, the cleanliness is bad. The canteen facility is also not good. The hostel facility is worth the money but the food is quite bad in the afternoon time. There are no medical facilities in the college.

admission_process.title: PES College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: PES College of Engineering admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, PES College of Engineering considers scores in GATE, KCET, and COMEDK UGET for admission to specific courses.PES College of Engineeringoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 84,270 - 7,44,444. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,16,940 - 1,36,940. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

cut_off.college_name: PES College of Engineering Cutoff 2025: Check Karnataka PGCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: PES College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

PES College of Engineering Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 30734 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at PES College of Engineering. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 30734 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 12295, while in 2023, it was 17367.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

PES College of Engineering accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) has the lowest cutoff rank of 33313 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 35365, in the General All India quota.

According to the PES College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Robotics & Artificial Intelligence stood at 49355 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 43815. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was less competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is PES College of Engineering. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. PES College of Engineering excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. hostel_campus.college_name: PES College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My journey with PESCE family.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is the best. We have good hostel facilities and security system for students. We have Free Wi-Fi supply for students in the hostel. Our labs are well maintained and have well advanced equipment for the purpose of studies and practice. We have a good library facility too. Our library has a very good collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: People are good in my college, but the faculty members are very poor at explaining.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi, labs, and a library, but they are not much use because they are just to clear your syllabus. However, there is a new lab with Mac machines, which are good, and we have done iOS classes there. The food is average for morning and afternoon, but very bad for night. Only 2 chapatis in the afternoon. The canteen is open till 5.

reviews.review_heading: Life in PES College of Engineering, Mandya.
reviews.review_text: Department is good the intake is 60 per year in ISE, and facilities are also good. Wi-Fi facility is provided throughout our campus, little problem with it in the hostel. Library is also good, we can take 3 books from there at a time. Canteen is average. Hostel is not so good for non-native students because most of the dishes are local food itself, and the rooms are average.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and is well-maintained.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our department are good. The classrooms are well-maintained. Labs are well-established. The hostel is also good, but the food is not as much as I want. The sports facilities are very good. The canteen on campus is well-maintained. We also have medical facilities in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am thankful to our college for allowing us to participate in technical events.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite old but it is improving now. In washrooms, the cleanliness is bad. The canteen facility is also not good. The hostel facility is worth the money but the food is quite bad in the afternoon time. There are no medical facilities in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for average students.
reviews.review_text: The hostel offers Wi-Fi, which is 30GB/month, you can use it however you want. The classrooms are decent and library is well and open during college hours. Hostel facilities are good. Quality of food in mess and canteen is too good.

reviews.review_heading: Happy to be in this college I hope that I get placed in good company.
reviews.review_text: Well-maintained hostel and canteens. The food prepared is very hygienic and worth the price. When it comes to classrooms, they are well maintained with smart boards in each classroom. AC is also available in the labs. Library is very well-maintained with lots of useful books. It gives us a peaceful environment to concentrate on reading.

reviews.review_heading: 2024 pass out from PES College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Policies like insurance were arranged by the college and it was renewed every year by them. Social responsible clubs and students union, representative selection were encouraged by the college management. Classrooms are highly ventilated and spacious has the capacity to hold 200 students at a time.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college's greenery.
reviews.review_text: We have 5 to 6 lab rooms, and of course, a library where we can study and borrow books for reference. Moreover, the hostel is good and we can accommodate compared to others. Food is also good. For sports, we can participate in any activity. Everything is good here.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members, when it comes to fees collection, they will be bit rude.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Our college is full of greenery. The people working love greenery could join our college. Faculty members are really good. During internals time, they will support below-average students to score good marks, and they support other activities like NSS and sports too.

reviews.review_heading: Average ratings for placement, infrastructure, and the overall course.
reviews.review_text: Industrial experience and other exposure were happened thrice in a year. Around 89% of students from the department of MCA succeeded by the placement drives. The highest salary package offered on campus drives was 17.5 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: Excellence in academic coaching.
reviews.review_text: Hostel circumstances are easy to accept for the freshers and the newcomers. We can approach the hostel in charge without any hesitation for all kinds of needs. The bus is fully air-conditioned, with two drivers who are experienced in the field of driving.

reviews.review_heading: Review of PES EC campus. It's the best college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Classrooms are also very good. They are well-furnished with digital learning available. Hostel is very nice and rooms are provided with all the necessary facilities. Food in the hostel mess is very nice and better than any other college. We can definitely like the food here. Wi-Fi is best and always constant.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college, but one has to work hard on their own to secure high packages.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-developed infrastructure and practical laboratories are well-equipped, including the Chemistry lab, Physics lab, MATLAB lab, and CAED lab. All are well-maintained and we also have smart classes and well-equipped library. Hostel facilities are nice as well.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: Good classrooms and labs, a vast library, and also 24x7 Wi-Fi available in any corner of the campus. The quality of food available in the canteen is average. Medical assistance is available all the time. Sports grounds are very vast and beautiful anyone in need or anyone who needs to practice anytime, ground will be available.

At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. St. Joseph's College of Engineering courses are offered to students in offline mode. individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The right path to our future.

content.Placements: Students at this college are placed on campus more frequently. The average package is 9 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the highest being 15 LPA. 85 percent of students are able to secure on-campus internships with organizations such as Microsoft, Wipro, and Flipkart.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a sizable library with almost all the books we want. Canteens that offer delectable snacks at affordable prices, and smart boards that let students learn subjects through visual aids. Snacks cultivated and made on campus are more affordable. Students can get whatever they need at this college because it has the best facilities.

individual_reviews.title: I'm absolutely satisfied because of the seniors.

content.Placements: In our college, up to 80% of the seniors got placed in many companies. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA, and the highest package is around 47 LPA. More than 1,080 companies visit per semester. In our batch, there are many students, with 60%. The roles offered are software engineer, developer, and tester.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of our college are good, and the infrastructure looks very traditional, as well as innovative. They split the students into two types, one is HOPE, and the second is PEP. There is a library with many articles, and compared to other colleges, our college food is so good.

admission_overview.college_name: St. Joseph's College of Engineering Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: SJCE Admission process 2025

paragraphs: St. Joseph College of Engineering admission is based on merit for some courses and on entrance exam scores for others.St. Joseph’s College of Engineeringis a private engineering college affiliated withAnna University, Chennai. The college offers degree programmes majorly in the field of engineering and technology. The college accepts national-level and state-level entrance exams, such as GATE, TANCET and TNEA. for admission to courses, namely MTech, MBA and BTech, respectively. St. Joseph College of Engineering offers four courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels in the fields of Engineering, Technology and Management. Candidates can apply for admission online through the official website.

St. Joseph College of Engineering admission to most of the courses is based on the performance of the candidate in the entrance exam except for BBA. Admission to the SJCE BBA course is based on the merit secured by the candidate in the qualifying exam. Candidates, however, for all courses are required to meet minimum eligibility criteria to get shortlisted for any and every course offered by SJCE. Check below popularSJCE coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

St. Joseph College of Engineering course admissions 2025 for all of its courses are either done based on merit or entrance exams. Check below the complete SJCE admission process:Application:The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.Selection rounds:If applying to the BTech, MTech or MBA course offered at the SJCE, then appear for the relevant entrance exam and then wait for the release of their results.

The college then shortlists candidates based on their performance in the entrance exam or merit in the qualifying examination.Admission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

reviews.review_text: Our department is equipped with spacious classrooms, fully air-conditioned computer and research labs and high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the academic blocks. Campus also includes a well-stocked central library with digital access to journals and e-books relevant to our course. Smart boards and projectors are available in most classrooms to support interactive learning. The hostels offer good infrastructure with clean rooms, 24X7 water and electricity, and Wi-Fi access. The quality of food in the me...

reviews.review_heading: The college that makes my dream come true.
reviews.review_text: The department offers Wi-Fi connections, a modern lab with A/C facilities, a smart class is also there and they have a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic amenities and the food provided in the mess is tasty. Also, they have canteen and the prices are very less compared to other canteens and good medical facilities. They also have an indoor and outdoor court to ensure the balance of the student.

reviews.review_heading: College has nice infrastructure and great faculty, but students still couldn't get enough exposure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, with many facilities, and it is also easy to fit in quickly. The hostel infrastructure is not that great, because the rooms are not worth the fees we pay every year. It is a decent place to stay.

reviews.review_heading: My college is a bright future for the youth.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available like Wi-Fi, 3 Labs, classrooms, library, smart classrooms, dispensary room, etc. Hostel is available with 24/7 Wi-Fi, good quality beds and pillows, twice daily room cleaning, laundry facilities, unlimited good-quality food, and a very large playing area.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with very high fees.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is okay. But the hostel infrastructure is very poor. A Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel and college. The hostel's Wi-Fi is poor. In 1st year hostel, there is no space for air to come in. In the second-year hostel, the air is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment, but placements are good in the earlier stage. College is strict.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the department is good but the Wi-Fi facilities are weak. Labs and classrooms are good. In the classroom, there is no Wi-Fi. The network is also low. Library is good. The food is excellent. In our college, it's compulsory to pay fee for food. Canteen is not good. Medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Choose the best needed to become the best.
reviews.review_text: There will be canteen facilities, drinking water facilities, a gym, and a large library that consists of plenty of books for the hostel students, and even day scholars can opt for that. The quality of food is good, and there is special treatment for students opting for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good food, strict rules, good placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is somewhat average since it is a 30-year-old college, but new buildings being constructed have some good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available only in the hostel and lab; no Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. Labs are good with all the necessary equipment, and hostel food quality is also above average.

reviews.review_heading: The correct route to your future.
reviews.review_text: The college includes a large library with nearly all the books we need, canteens that serve delicious refreshments at a reasonable cost, and smart boards that allow students to learn topics visually. Snacks produced and grown on campus are offered at less money. With the best facilities, students may obtain all they need at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Best engineering college in Chennai.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi in all the labs, and each floor has a lab, so the Wi-Fi can reach the classrooms. Still mobile phones are not allowed. There is no canteen inside the college, but there is a stall that sells fries and noodles and a bakery that sells baked goods at very low prices.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for the people who follow rules and study well.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel is clean and neat, and the food is good compared to other colleges. The college has the best lab facilities. Still the mobile data signal is weak in the hostel and on campus.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, food, teaching, and infrastructure are too good.
reviews.review_text: I'm currently in the 1st year. The hostel is good, and the overall infrastructure is very nice. However, many people say our college is one of the strictest in Chennai. They are strict about dress code, lab activities, and speaking in English. The food here is like heaven.

highlights.summary: Uttaranchal University admissions 2026 are open for Diploma, UG, PG, and PhD courses. Interested aspirants can check and apply for their desired courses through the official website of the university. A few more updates are as follows:

table.details: NIRF 75 in Pharmacy category, NIRF 201-300 in Engineering category

college_info.intro:
Uttaranchal University Dehradun offers UG & PG level programmes in the fields like Engineering, Management, Law, Pharmacy etc. BTech, MBA & Pharmaceutical Programmes are popular courses among the students. It is has NIRF ranking of 75 in Pharmcy & 201-300 ranking in Engineering category. BTech is provided at the UG level with the duration of 4 years. It includes streams like Computer Science, Aerospace, Artificial Intelligence,etc. After successful completion of the programme, students can explore their career as Software Developers, Computer Engineers, Data Analyst, Systems Analysts, IT Consultants, etc.
Pharmaceutical Programmes are provided at both Ug & PG level. BPharma is offered at the UG level, while MPharma at the PG level. The career prospect for these courses include roles like Pharmacist, Production and Quality Manager, etc. Apart from this, the university also offers a 2-year MBA programme at the PG level. MBA programme includes industry interactions, group presentations, field projects, case study analysis, and company visits to develop the practical skills of the students. Students can check the courses given by Uttaranchal University Dehradun below:

faqs.answer: A:    For BSc programme Uttaranchal University accepts the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET). Therefore, it is mandatory for candidates to appear for the NEET exam. Candidates must apply for the NEET exam and fill out the NEET application form. However, the entrance exam is only required for BSc Medical courses. Apart from the medical courses, admission to BSc is based on candidates' performance in the last qualifying exam.

review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities is good Wi-Fi works sometimes nicely but most times not good, we have computer labs, classrooms are quite good, and library is also good. Hostel Facilities are good as I have home here but I know from friend, mess also good sports are also held.

course_faqs.question: What is the fee for BCom at Uttaranchal University?
course_faqs.answer: Uttaranchal University BCom fee is range from INR 3.7 lakh. The fee might include multiple components which must be paid at the time of admission. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of amount INR 10,000, and a hostel fee of amount INR 2.57 lakh that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee. Also, candidates must pay an registration fee of INR 1,200 for registration.The fees for courses are offered based on two quotas - Uttarakhand Quota and All India

course_faqs.question: Does Uttaranchal University offers free BCom course?
course_faqs.answer: Uttaranchal University doesn't offer any have any free BCom course. Candidates must pay the course-wise to get admission. However, the university does offers few scholarships for their students. Students can avial these scholarships as an fee consession. Candidates must make sure to be eligible for the scholarships and apply for the same with supporting documents. Few of thre scholarships are as follows:Merit ScholarshipsUttaranchal State Domicile ScholarshipHill State Domicile ScholarshipSushil

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc in Uttaranchal University?
overview_faqs.answer: Uttaranchal University BSc fee is range from INR 1.8 Lacs - INR 6.5 lakh. The fee might include multiple components which must be paid at the time of admission. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of amount INR 10,000, and a hostel fee of amount INR 2.57 lakh that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee. To get admitted to Uttaranchal University BSc in English course, applicants must meet the eligibility criteria. Eligibility Criteria: Class 12 with 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics / Biology.Selection Criteria: CUET + Interview

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure for various courses at Uttaranchal University?
overview_faqs.answer: Uttaranchal University fees (total tuition fee) is include various components such as hostel fees, tuition fees, security deposits, and more. It is within the rights of the university to revise the fee structure. Below are Uttaranchal University courses and fees:CoursesTotal Tuition FeeMBAINR 82,000 - INR 5.4 lakhBTechINR 6 Lacs - INR10.8 lakhMScINR 1.4 Lacs - INR 2.7 lakhBBAINR 87,000 - INR 4.1 lakhNOTE: The above-mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for BA at Uttaranchal University?
overview_faqs.answer: The Uttaranchal University application fee for BA is INR 1,200. Candidates applying online can pay the application fee via Credit Card/Debit Card/UPI/Internet Banking. For candidates appying offline the mode of payment can be Cash /Cheque /DD /Credit /Debit card /NEFT /RTGS /UPI. Interested candidates must submit the Uttaranchal University application form along with the application fee before the deadline.

overview_faqs.question: Are there any BCom fee quota for at Uttaranchal University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Uttaranchal University follow state quota system for its BCom course. The univesity has Uttarakhand and All India quota system for their cousre fee. The fee vary across both the quotas. The quota also has categories under which the merit scholarships are offered as a fee waiver. review_summary.college_name: Uttaranchal University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is excellent as it helps us achieve our dreams.

content.Placements: Students are placed in various companies such as Wipro, Deloitte, HCL, Tech Mahindra, TCS, and many more. The highest package is 1.24 crores, the lowest package is 2.4 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. About 55% of students get internships at companies like Codetech and Wipro. The top roles offered in my course are web developer, app developer, and cybersecurity.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in classrooms and laboratories, including lab assistants, good Wi-Fi, and a neat and clean environment. The campus is very clean. In the hostel, all basic facilities are provided, such as a table, an almirah, a shoe rack, a chair, a fan, a water cooler, and a geyser. The food quality in the mess is good, but sometimes it is not that good. Medical facilities are available 24/7 as there is a hospital on the campus. Sports are held 2–3 times a year.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure, but the fees are a little bit on the higher side, education is good.

content.Placements: If you work beyond average, you can get a package. The average 4 to 5 LPA you can expect. Many companies visit the college. Mainly, job offers are on the marketing side. The highest package they claim in BBA is 10 LPA, and the average is 4 to 5 LPA. 70 to 80 per cent of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is on top-notch, no compromises with this. All facilities are available, like Wi-Fi campus, green campus, each library for each department, canteen food is at a reasonable price, sports available, games available in the hostel, and Wi-Fi speed is a little slow.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good nature vibes, infrastructure is old but it's okay, cafeteria is crowded.

content.Placements: 1. It was around 80 students in 1st semester. 2. The highest package was around 6-7 LPA, the lowest was 2-2.5lpa, avg was around between 3-4 LPA. 3. Top recruiting company in BBA was Wipro, Accenture, Deloitte, TCS, IBM, HCL, Capgemini, Infosys, ITC, and HDFC Bank 4. Around 30?40% of BBA students get internships in companies 5. Top roles were marketing executive, hr manager, digital marketing specials.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities is good Wi-Fi works sometimes nicely but most times not good, we have computer labs, classrooms are quite good, and library is also good. Hostel Facilities are good as I have home here but I know from friend, mess also good sports are also held.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. with ACCA Certification Course - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Placements: Many students get placed in my course, so I cannot say the exact number. The highest package offered, as per my knowledge, is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are HSBC, Amazon, Infosys, Citibank, Deloitte, KPMG, and EY. 60 percent of students get internships from my course. Roles like financial analyst, auditor, and global chartered accountant are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Network stability is too low. I give it 2 stars. Labs are clean and very peaceful. Classrooms are well-maintained and comfortable. The library has many collections of books, and we can take books from there according to our mindset. I do not stay in the hostel, so I do not know about it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and strong IT learning experience with decent placements

content.Placements: 80 percent of students were placed. The highest packages are up to 150 LPA (international) and 60 LPA (domestic), with the average package around 5–6 LPA, and the lowest around 2.5–3.5 LPA per holder. Top recruiting companies are Microsoft, Google, Adobe, Amazon, Wipro, Deloitte, TCS, Capgemini, and Infosys. About 30 percent of students reported internships in companies like Google, Zscaler, Hike, IBM, and Amazon.
content.Infrastructure: The university offers good facilities for the B.Sc. IT department, including high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a resourceful central library. Hostels are clean, secure, and provide Wi-Fi, 24/7 electricity, and common rooms. The mess and canteen food are hygienic and decent, with multiple options. Medical needs are handled through an on-campus health centre with first-aid and ambulance availability. The campus also has indoor and outdoor sports facilities, including grounds, courts, and recreation areas. Overall, the infrastructure is well-maintained and student-friendly.

admission_overview.college_name: Uttaranchal University Admissions 2025: Application, Dates, Courses, Eligibility

admission_overview.title: Uttaranchal University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Uttaranchal University admission 2025 is both entrance and merit-based. The university offers a wide range of courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Uttaranchal University accepts relevant entrance exam scores to shortlist candidates for admission. For instance, admission to the BTech course is done based on the rank secured in JEE Main and for MBA, Uttaranchal University accepts MAT/ CAT /CMAT / XAT/ UU Entrance Test scores. Further, merit in the last qualifying exam is also considered for admission to courses, such as BA. Uttaranchal University courses are offered through its various constituent schools and institutes. The courses are offered in various areas of study such as Management, Engineering, Law, etc. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the eligibility criteria, courses, and admission procedure of the university.

eligibility_selection.title: Uttaranchal University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Uttaranchal University course admission is entrance-based for most of the offered programmes and is done based on preset admission criteria. Students looking to enrol into any of the offered courses need to meet the general eligibility requirements along with the selection criteria for admission. The university conducts its own entrance test in addition to accepting valid scores obtained in national-level entrance exams, such as MAT/ CAT/ XAT, CMAT, JEE Mains, etc.

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved categories)
courses_table.selection_criteria: MAT/ CAT /CMAT / XAT/ UU Entrance Test Score/Percentile + Interview

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in PCM/ PCB/ Agriculture or equivalent from a recognised board
BSc in relevant specialisation with a minimum of 50% marks (45% for reserved categories)
Class 12 in PCM with a minimum of 60% marks(55% for reserved categories)
courses_table.selection_criteria: JEE Main/ All National Aptitude Tests/ Qualifying Examination + PI

faqs.answer: You may get into the univeristy with 60% in Class 12, however, this depends on several factors. Uttaranchal University UG admissions require students to pass Class 12 in a relevant stream and with specified aggregate. The aggregate usually ranges from 42% to 50% (based on the course and category). Hence, yes,  60% is certainly enough to clear that criteria. However, as admission to certain courses, such as BTech are done on an entrance basis, students need to provide scores obtained in the accepted exam to be eligible for admission. Students may connect with the admission desk of the university to learn more about the admission chances of the university.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in Uttaranchal University with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: Uttaranchal University selection criteria is both merit & entrance-based. The university accepts both national-level entrance exams in addition to conducting its own exam. Further, for certain courses, such as BTech, MSc, students are also required to appear for the PI rounds conducted by the university. admission_process.title: Uttaranchal University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: TheUttaranchal University admission processstarts with the release ofUU application forms. Eligible candidates are required to fill out the application form before the deadline. The University shortlists candidates either based on merit secured in the qualifying exam or based on the performance of candidates in the entrance exam. All the applicants must appear for the personal interview round. Interested students can check out theUttaranchal University admission processfrom below:

Theapplication processis conducted in bothonline & offline modes. To apply online candidates are required to visit the official website of the university & click on the apply now option to fill out the application form. Candidates can also visit theUttaranchal University campus& purchase the application form from the admission office.
Step 2:Selection Process

To shortlist candidates, Uttaranchal University accepts various national-level entrance examination scores like JEE Main, MAT, XAT, NEET etc. as per the stream of the programme. The university also shortlists candidatesbased on merit secured in the qualifying examinations.Students are also called in for personal interview as per the criteria of the desired programme.
Step 3: Final Admission

Shortlisted candidates will get an offer letter from the university. They need to pay the admission confirmation fee to accept the offer, post which, the students will receive the admission confirmation letter.
For more information aboutUttaranchal Universitycheck out the below video:

faqs.question: Which exam is required for BSc at Uttaranchal University?
faqs.answer: For BSc programme Uttaranchal University accepts theNational Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET).Therefore, it is mandatory for candidates to appear for the NEET exam. hostel_campus.college_name: Uttaranchal University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel of Uttaranchal University has a provision for the single room, double room, three bed and four-bedroom. Each room is furnished with bed/beds, mattress, study table, chair, cupboard and curtains. 4000 boys and girls can accommodate in the campus hostel. There are spacious lawns within the hostel campus for the students to play different games or to take walk or recreate themselves. Great care is taken to maintain hygienic conditions and cleanliness. Hostel common rooms are fully equipped with HD TV network, indoor games, newspapers and laundry staff. There is a separate group of hostel maintenance staff under the active supervision of the Chief Warden. The hostel offers many exciting experiences both in the terms of games and entertainment.

library.description: The Uttaranchal University’s library holds a hybrid collection of 125000 books, 125 current periodicals, 1000 back volumes, 15 National newspapers, 1000+ e-journals and e-books of National / International societies  500+ dissertations and over 2500 CDs/DVDs.  The bibliographical details and content pages for all the books are accessible through OPAC. The Library has a collection of approximately 3500 clippings concerning to topics relevant to the academic community of the University. The Library has a multimedia section to access NPTEL video lectures on various subjects and topics.

reviews.review_heading: It is excellent as it helps us achieve our dreams.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in classrooms and laboratories, including lab assistants, good Wi-Fi, and a neat and clean environment. The campus is very clean. In the hostel, all basic facilities are provided, such as a table, an almirah, a shoe rack, a chair, a fan, a water cooler, and a geyser. The food quality in the mess is good, but sometimes it is not that good. Medical facilities are available 24/7 as there is a hospital on the campus. Sports are held 2–3 times a year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 23 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, but the fees are a little bit on the higher side, education is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is on top-notch, no compromises with this. All facilities are available, like Wi-Fi campus, green campus, each library for each department, canteen food is at a reasonable price, sports available, games available in the hostel, and Wi-Fi speed is a little slow.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 15 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good nature vibes, infrastructure is old but it's okay, cafeteria is crowded.
reviews.review_text: Facilities is good Wi-Fi works sometimes nicely but most times not good, we have computer labs, classrooms are quite good, and library is also good. Hostel Facilities are good as I have home here but I know from friend, mess also good sports are also held.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Network stability is too low. I give it 2 stars. Labs are clean and very peaceful. Classrooms are well-maintained and comfortable. The library has many collections of books, and we can take books from there according to our mindset. I do not stay in the hostel, so I do not know about it.

Hostels are clean, secure, and provide Wi-Fi, 24/7 electricity, and common rooms. The mess and canteen food are hygienic and decent, with multiple options. Medical needs are handled through an on-campus health centre with first-aid and ambulance availability. The campus also has indoor and outdoor sports facilities, inclu...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 3 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good. I like this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and library are available. Classrooms are also good, they are clean. But there is network issue. The phone's network didn't come, so we can't use the net properly. Wi-Fi network also doesn't work properly. Library is good, and so many books available in the library. Food is not that' much good.

reviews.review_heading: UIT, B.Tech course in specialization of AI and ML.
reviews.review_text: The college has given all the required facilities to the student, so that they don't have to go out of campus for getting something. The marketplace is also provided in college area. The medical facilities are also up to the mark in case of any emergency happens to students.

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech course at Uttarachal University.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is properly made with well-maintained classrooms having proper ventilation. The classroom size is around 80 students. Hostel facilities are decent, with rooms having furniture. There is proper security with an allotted warden for each hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 18 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Uit BCA course Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: There are always many complaints regarding the hostel facilities, which are also not being properly taken care of by the college itself. Food is very degraded and not prepared hygienically. Most of the students prefer to take flats outside the college premises to avoid such conditions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 16 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: BCA course in UIT- USCS Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is maintained properly, along with which proper cleaning takes place every day. The class size for one batch of BCA is around 76 students. Wi-Fi facilities are not good on campus, and in the hostel, asking for Wi-Fi facilities is way too costly.

reviews.review_heading: Good hostel & events, average academics, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is value for money, and the food in the mess is quite good. Breakfast, lunch, and snacks are well prepared, though dinner could be better. Canteen food is average. Wi-Fi is available 24/7, but in some areas, the connectivity is not very stable. Medical facilities are provided, and in the evening, students enjoy playing cricket and football on the ground. The only drawback of the hostel is that the warden tends to be too strict. All the academic buildings are equipped with well maintai...

reviews.review_heading: UIT College, Dehradun for the course B.Teach.
reviews.review_text: I like the college campus very much as it is so huge, surrounded by so much land with all the facilities. There are many cafeterias or food courts in the college itself. There are many sports and game facilities in the college for the students who are very fond of sports. Other than this, the college also conducts many seminars or functions at least once in two weeks to gain engagement among students.

reviews.review_heading: University for B.Tech AI/Ml.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is highly admirable and well-maintained with proper cleanliness and all the facilities required by the students. Most of the facilities are provided by the college in the tuition and hostel fees themselves. There are no additional charges for them. Other than this, there are sports facilities through which you can play lots of games in inter-college competitions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Uttaranchal Institute of Management, Uttaranchal UniversityReviewed on 29 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and all the necessary facilities are available in this college.
reviews.review_text: I am very much like the infrastructure of this college. Additionally, the college provides all necessary facilities, including free Wi-Fi. Furthermore, the classrooms are spacious. Our college has three to four sports grounds, as well as a library area where you can borrow books for your course.

reviews.review_heading: For B.Tech, it is the best preference.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and the department buildings are very good and spacious. The college also has many built-in facilities, such as a library for each course, Wi-Fi, which is available all the time. In addition to this, the college also has its own temple. The seniors of the college are also very helpful and nice.

Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, Pondicherry Engineering College - PEC has an impressive review rating of 3.61 by 138 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Pondicherry Engineering College - PEC?

faqs.answer: A:    Pondicherry Engineering College - PEC offers median package range of INR 468,750 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance programme and has been rated 3.6 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.
faqs.question: What is the median package offered at Pondicherry Engineering College - PEC during placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Pondicherry Engineering College - PEC offers a wide range of programmes at UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. Pondicherry Engineering College - PEC fee structure ranges between INR 76,100 to 1,28,404.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the Pondicherry Engineering College - PEC is around INR 76100 - INR 195404.
faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Pondicherry Engineering College - PEC?

faqs.answer: A:    The MBA fee at Pondicherry Engineering College is around INR 76,100. Candidates must pay the MBA course fees to confirm the admission. PEC fees might include components other than tuition fees. The above fees are calculated basis first year/ semester. The actual fee may vary.
faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Pondicherry Engineering College?

faqs.answer: A:    Pondicherry Technological University MBA course has a total seat intake of 90 seats. The seats are divided among the two MBA specialisations. The seat bifurcation are as follows:CoursesSeatsMBA in Innovation, Entrepreneurship and Venture Development30MBA in International Business60
faqs.question: How many seats are offered under the Pondicherry Technological University MBA course?

faqs.answer: A:    Pondicherry Technological University doesn't accept CAT exam score for MBA admission. The university only accepts MBA admission via the counselling process. Candidates must have a valid qualification before applying for the course. Eligible candidates are further required to submit all the relevant documents for proof. Only eligible candidates can only move forward with the application process. Applicants must have bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate (45% for the reserved category) or equivalent CGPA in the degree examinations.

review_content.Placements: The average package is about 6 LPA, but the highest can be up to 18-20 LPA, and you also get an internship in big companies like Qualcomm and more. The rest is up to you, the harder you work, the more you will get. The T&P cell helps you get a job.

review_content.Infrastructure: Campus has a central Wi-Fi that works all over the campus. The campus is also very big. Library has more than 8,000 books on all streams of engineering. Classrooms are decent.
review_content.Faculty: Curriculum is very good. The teaching quality is also very good, except for some teachers who make college life feel like school life, rest are all good. The exams are comparatively medium level. Sometimes the board asks very tough questions but generally easy. Faculty members are also very good and supportive, except for some.

course_faqs.question: Is MBA available in Pondicherry Technological University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, MBA is available in Pondicherry Technological University or Pondicherry Engineering College - PEC. The MBA course is offered as a regular and full-time course. The PG-level programme is offered in two major areas: International Business and Innovation, Entrepreneurship & Venture Development. The MBA admission will be conducted by the Postgraduate Admission Committee (PGAC) of PTU. Pondicherry Technological University MBA admission is counselling-based. However, before applying candidates mu

course_faqs.question: Is there scholarships offered under the Pondicherry Technological University MBA course?
course_faqs.answer: Pondicherry Technological University doesn't offer its own scholarships but it accepts scholarships under the Government of Puducherry. Pondicherry Technological University accepts the scholarships under the National Scholarship Portalis. NSP is an online portal by the Government of India for applying, processing, verifying and sanction of Government scholarships to students.

content.Placements: Placements are decent. Most of the students get placed in various companies. The minimum package is 3 LPA, and the median is about 6.5 LPA. The faculty members, especially the training and placement cell help a lot in the placement. Around 45 out of 60 got placed.
content.Infrastructure: Campus has a central Wi-Fi that works all over the campus. The campus is also very big. Library has more than 8,000 books on all streams of engineering. Classrooms are decent.
content.Faculty: Curriculum is very good. The teaching quality is also very good, except for some teachers who make college life feel like school life, rest are all good. The exams are comparatively medium level. Sometimes the board asks very tough questions but generally easy. Faculty members are also very good and supportive, except for some.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Campus life and hostel life are good.

content.Placements: Decent companies come here to the Training and Placement Centre. Moreover, you get an above-average salary. But don't expect extraordinary companies to hire you from here. As it is a Tier 2 college, you should not expect any MNCs to visit. All the best.
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, the in and out timings are okay, but the food is typical South Indian and below average. Electricity is there most of the time, but it goes off during heavy rain. Still, there is a generator for power backup. Wi-Fi facility is good, but mobile internet is not there.

faqs.question: How to secure MBA seats at Pondicherry Technological University?

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
